programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian jumps into building the back of the car.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian works with a wild idea for the rear design.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian builds with a variety of parts to design the front end.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian tries to turn a crazy concept into reality and complete the front end.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage

programme.title: Full Custom Garage

programme.title: Full Custom Garage

programme.title: Full Custom Garage

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bus Stop Bruiser
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on the lame, Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Luck Be A Lady
programme.desc: Dog and company head to the Big Island in pursuit of two courthouse no-shows only to find that one of them appears to be posting status updates from Southern California.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Behind the Hunt
programme.desc: The cameras are turned around, as we get a tour of life "behind the scenes" on Dog the Bounty Hunter. Using interviews with Dog and the posse, the TV crew, and never before seen footage, this is one of most revealing and heartfelt episodes of the series.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: God Looks on the Heart
programme.desc: This fugitive spells trouble for Dog in today's hunt. When the leads grow cold it's the US Postal Service to the rescue as a mail carrier lends a helping hand. Dog's team surrounds the suspected safe house and silently awaits their prey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Big Brother
programme.desc: Today's case involves a Samoan so Dog knows that the runner's close-knit kinfolk hold the keys to bringing him in. Dog's plan is to convince family that everyone is best served if the fugitive mans up and takes care of business.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mid-Course Correction
programme.desc: Dog's target for today was once an upstanding member of his community. Now with no home, no job and the law on his trail, this middle-aged exile from middle-class society is using the cold end of an ice pipe to soothe his troubled soul.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Baby's Back in Town
programme.desc: Dog tries to nab a fugitive, named Wayne, by calling and telling him that he's won a new vacuum cleaner and he should stick around to get it. Dog then sends his daughter, Lyssa, to "deliver" the vacuum cleaner and lure Wayne out of his house.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Surprise! Surprise!
programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: No Ice in Paradise
programme.desc: Dog and his team fight the war on ice-crystal methamphetamine-on many fronts. They appear on a special anti-drug float in a parade. Then they go after bail-jumping Pana, a convicted drug dealer.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertson family pulls together a family reunion to give Mia a big send-off before her surgery.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Governor's Travels
programme.desc: When the Governor of Louisiana announces that he will be coming to Duck Commander to present Willie with a commerce award, John Luke volunteers to give the introduction speech.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack and Gown
programme.desc: With Reed's graduation day approaching, Jase decides to take Reed frog hunting the night before, like he did on the day of his own graduation. Willie and Si join in, and Jase tries to keep them from imparting their "college advice" on Reed.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hands on a Woodchipper
programme.desc: When Willie agrees to sponsor Mountain Man's radio contest, a "Hands on a Hardbody" competition, he somehow finds himself competing against Si for Mountain Man's last minute prize: a woodchipper.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack Draft
programme.desc: When the Robertsons participate in the West Monroe Fire Department pancake breakfast, the firemen invite Willie and his brothers to train with the department for the day. Meanwhile, Phil and Si accompany Miss Kay on a trip to visit a family grave.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Brand of Brothers
programme.desc: When Willie contemplates re-branding the Duck Commander image, Jase takes issue with having an outsider design their image, so he and the guys create their own new logo and business cards. Meanwhile, Willie and Phil help Bella with her science project.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: De-Bug Life
programme.desc: The guys realize it is time for the annual cleaning of the duck blinds when they come across a gator using one as a home. Meanwhile, while the kids are running the church car wash, Si and Willie disagree on the best way to draw in customers.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Men vs. Wild
programme.desc: Brotherly competition is taken to a whole new level when Jase and Willie challenge Alan and Jep to a survival race through the woods on Phil's property. Meanwhile, Si is interested in finding a new hobby when he sees Kay cutting coupons.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Return of the Beavers
programme.desc: When Phil discovers more beaver activity on the Robertson land, he recruits Jase, Jep, and Si to get rid of them. Meanwhile, Willie and Korie bring Bella to her first day of karate practice.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Stumped on a way to celebrate Willie's birthday, Korie enlists the guys' help and Jase takes the reigns in planning a trip to the lake where Phil and Kay used to live. Meanwhile, the women realize a raccoon is inside the lake house.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The problems of the handicapped are addressed when an amputee joins a crusade after a false fire alarm.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Goodbye, Mr. Zelinka
programme.desc: Mr. Zelinka is a beloved teacher who is being forced to retire because he's old. Jonathan and Mark know that he would prefer to continue teaching.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Choices
programme.desc: The parents of two Vietnamese children come to America to look for them after a ten-year separation.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Summer Camp
programme.desc: After having been scarred in a fire, an actress becomes a counselor at a summer camp for blind children. The camp is run by Jonathan and Mark's blind friend Frank.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Inner Limits
programme.desc: A young man decides to institutionalize his brother who has been completely paralyzed and speechless for many years, against the wishes of their mother.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Mass Sightings
programme.desc: UFO sightings are at an all time high. What makes these mass sightings incredible is also what makes them terrifying, and what might happen next?

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Abductions
programme.desc: These are first-hand experiences of the most terrifying kind: stories shot through with mystery, fear and endless questions.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Security Threat
programme.desc: When your day job involves the oversight of missile silos, nuclear facilities or a military base, the last complication you want is a close encounter with a UFO...

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Physical Contact
programme.desc: These are the witnesses that have been literally touched by the unknown. Do these cases hold the answer to the central question of UFOlogy?

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Air to Air
programme.desc: Being on an aircraft that comes in close proximity to an object that doesn't appear on radar is a scary experience. Who are they and what do they want?

programme.title: NEW: The Siege of Malta
programme.desc: At last here is the definitive story of heroism and hardship of a people uniquely and collectively awarded the George Cross 'for gallantry', and told by some of the heroic survivors.

programme.title: War Story: Bomber Command: Hitting Back
programme.desc: After surviving the German bombing campaign of British cities, RAF Bomber Command struck back against Germany. The devastating consequences of raids, for both for the young men in the skies and the people on the ground, are portrayed in this film.

programme.title: War Story: Bomber Command: Getting Home
programme.desc: In this film, Bomber Command personnel and a Luftwaffe pilot take the viewer through the frightening reality of fighting in the skies as they try to get a damaged bomber home.

programme.title: War Story: Bomb Girls Remember
programme.desc: During the Second World War, 250,000 Canadian women helped to build the arsenal of democracy. These young women met the challenges of factory work and helped to win the Second World War, and by doing so, paved the way for future generations.

programme.title: War Story: Sicily: The First Campaign
programme.desc: The Sicily Campaign began with the largest seaborne invasion in history on 9-10 July 1943. The Allied forces of Britain, Canada, and the United States sought to knock Italy out of the war and attack Germany from the south.

programme.title: War Story: Ortona: The War Inside
programme.desc: The War Inside is a personal retelling of one of the fiercest battles of the Italian Campaign from the searing points of view of Canadian infantrymen, a tanker, a stretcher bearer, and a German paratrooper.

programme.title: War Story: The Road to Rome
programme.desc: The Road to Rome examines the incredible experiences of Canadian veterans, the victories and horrors of armoured combat, and the pivotal value, far too often neglected, of the overall Italian Campaign.

programme.title: War Story: Out of the Clouds: Paras in Normandy
programme.desc: In Normandy, the 1st Canadian Parachute Battalion proved itself to be in the vanguard of the best-trained and toughest units in the Allied forces.

programme.title: War Story: Across the Rhine: Paras in Germany
programme.desc: In mid-September 1944, the remnants of the battered 1st Canadian Parachute Battalion participated in the largest parachute drop in history, fought a successful battle.

programme.title: War Story: Vengeance
programme.desc: In 1941, nearly 30,000 Jews escaped the ghettos and work camps and they joined the growing underground resistance army, actively fighting the Nazis.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jasmine writes to Nev and Max asking for help for a 'friend'. But they're perplexed when Jasmine drops a bombshell revelation: they've helped her friend before! Who is Jasmine's mysterious friend and how do Nev and Max know him?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miranda & Cameryn
programme.desc: After years of online chats Miranda discovered that Cameryn was not the man he claimed to be. She confronted him only to be given another suspicious profile. Is he someone else entirely?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Solana & Elijah
programme.desc: Solana is in a relationship with Danny but can't stop thinking about her online love Elijah. His photos were used in so many profiles that she has to know is this the real Elijah?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Alante has been planning a life with his online love. She's perfect but her disappearances have Alante worried. Nev and Max help uncover a truth that affects Alante's entire town. (S6, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Chitara & Priscilla
programme.desc: Chitara took a big leap and came out to her family when she met Priscilla online, but Priscilla ended their relationship unexpectedly. Now Chitara is determined to find out what happened. (S4, ep5)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike & Kristen
programme.desc: Mike met Kristen on Facebook. They quickly forged a deep connection, but Mike's frequent efforts to meet Kristen have been futile. Will Mike finally get face-to-face with Kristen?

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 202
programme.desc: Cassie is set on telling her best friend Sean she has a crush on him. Nyk is ready to reveal to her best friend Katie how much she likes her.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 113
programme.desc: Kris tries to woo his best friend Lauren with a special love song. Rachel musters the courage to tell Billy how she really feels.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 222
programme.desc: Robin is ready to tell his best friend Chelsey, that he likes her. Tyler's been crushing on his best friend Lauren and is finally ready to let her know.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 106
programme.desc: Jaime has only known Steve for a year but the feelings she has for him make her want to be more than friends. Together Jackie and Frank have lost almost 200 pounds, newly fit Jackie now wants to make Frank her boyfriend.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 218
programme.desc: Andrew shows his true feelings when he tells his best friend that he likes her. Myke worries his feelings for Seanna could ruin their friendship.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 212

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 213

programme.title: Teen Mom OG

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: Jo confronts Kailyn about dating Jordan, Leah continues planning for her wedding, Jenelle and Kieffer hatch a plan to run off and things between Chelsea and Adam go downhill.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Two Steps Forward
programme.desc: Things between Leah and Corey turn ugly, Chelsea decides to celebrate her break-up, Jenelle's plans start to crumble and Kailyn settles into life at her mum's house.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: One Step Back
programme.desc: Chelsea argues with Adam about child support, Jenelle has to face the music, Kailyn tries to focus on college and Leah and Corey get closer.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: Chelsea's dad tries to cut Adam out of her life, Jenelle is arrested for breaking and entering, Kailyn signs a joint custody agreement and Leah and Corey tie the knot. Last in the series.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Up in Flames 1936-1940
programme.desc: Up in Flames 1936-1940: At the end of 1939, the German Army invades Poland. Examine how Hitler succeeded in pushing through his rearmament and war plans relatively unhindered.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: The Gates of Hell 1941-1942
programme.desc: The Gates of Hell 1941-1942: In the shadow of the war, the Nazi regime gradually advances its "final solution to the Jewish problem", culminating in the Holocaust.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Genocide 1942-1944
programme.desc: Genocide 1942 - 1944: Along with Treblinka and Majdanek, Sobibor was one of the camps used in Operation Reinhard, in which the Nazis murdered almost two million people.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Armageddon 1943-1945
programme.desc: Armageddon 1943-1945: The defeat at Stalingrad in 1943 was the turning point of the war and convinced the Nazi leadership to intensify their terror and propaganda campaigns.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: The Reckoning 1945-1948
programme.desc: The Reckoning 1945-1948: In 1945, WWII was over but the violence had not ended. The survivors want to blame the Germans. The reckoning with National Socialism is ambivalent.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: The Lost Continent (Atlantis)
programme.desc: As the Nazis rose to power, Himmler and the SS were convinced Atlantis could be found, and instigated a series of archeological expeditions seeking uncover and exploit its secrets.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Weekend Warriors
programme.desc: Tuna.com continues its winning streak, catching two fish in one day while the rest of the fleet struggles to even find a spot to fish in between the weekend recreational boaters.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Size Matters
programme.desc: Meet Kevin and the Christina, a boat that gets its own real-life fish story when it snags an 1,100-pound \\"monstah\\" right out of the gate.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Greed, Ego & Jealousy
programme.desc: After watching the Christina catch the biggest tuna of the season, the uber-competitive Captain Dave of the Tuna.com is obsessed with beating the record, and catching a fish bigger than 1,075 lbs!

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mann gegen Sturm
programme.desc: Marciano, captain of Hard Merchandise, risks the elements to hook a giant bluefin and finds himself with boat trouble in the midst of the storm.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mutiny at Sea
programme.desc: A mixture of bad luck and mutiny brews in this tumultuous episode of Wicked Tuna. Tensions erupt on New England's top tuna boat, Tuna.Com, when Captain Dave and Paul get into a heated confrontation that causes Paul to quit!

programme.title: Macintyre: Worlds toughest Towns: Mexico
programme.desc: Mexico City is one of the largest metropolises in the world, buts it is also the Kidnapping Capital of the world MacIntyre finds himself thrown head first into a city where life is cheap and the criminals operate with impunity.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Crow Creek
programme.desc: This week, Montana game wardens saddle up for a back country patrol in search of poachers while other wardens are busy with other illegal hunters and anglers, not to mention an elderly man who is feeding deer he shouldn't be.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Whitefish
programme.desc: This week, wardens come across a gruesome crime involving deer poachers as well as some illegal fishing activity. They also say goodbye to one of their own, as Captain Jeff Darrah retires from duty after 26 years on the job.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation White Sulpher
programme.desc: This week, wardens deal with conflicting hunting stories which leads one man into trouble. Meanwhile, other wardens deal with would-be trespassers as the hunting season comes to a close.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Recap
programme.desc: This week, we sit down with Bryan Golie, Jeff Darrah, Joe Kambic, and John Lasofsky as they recount what they've been through in their careers as well as what happened this past season.

programme.title: Aliens In USSR
programme.desc: Unsolved Soviet Union Alien Mysteries: Dyatlov Pass incident, Petrozavodsk miracle, Voronezh case. Amaze and frighten, but doubt of alien involvement.

programme.title: Hopkinsville: The Alien Goblins

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Revisit 2: Jersey/Warwickshire
programme.desc: This week we're going back to visit two very different sets of house hunters who had one thing on their minds – space, and they wanted lots of it!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Wiltshire

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: London Northside

programme.title: Arthur: Happy Anniversary
programme.desc: Arthur's parents have been married for 10 years and it's time to celebrate! But the festivities are cut short when the van breaks down, stranding the whole family. Will the Reads miss their fancy dinner reservation?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Treasure Hunt/The Return Of The King
programme.desc: When Buster digs up an ancient arrowhead, everyone else wants to hunt for buried treasures, too. And a field trip to the Medieval Fair pits Arthur's class against another led by Ratburn's super-tough mentor, Mr. Pryce-Jones.

programme.title: Arthur: My Dad, The Garbage Man/Poor Muffy
programme.desc: Mr. Ratburn's class is taking a field trips to visit parents at their jobs. Francine's not sure she wants the class to know her dad is a garbage man. And a new carpet and a sneezing attack means Muffy must spend the weekend at Francine's.

programme.title: Arthur: Sue Ellen's Lost Diary/Arthur's Knee
programme.desc: Poor Sue Ellen has lost the one thing she's never without--her diary. Then, Arthur's hurt his knee but won't tell Mom--because then she'd know he'd been playing down at the dump , where he was NOT allowed to go.

programme.title: Arthur: Attack Of The Turbo Tibbles/D.W. Tricks The Tooth Fairy
programme.desc: If you think the Tibbles are bad now, imagine what they'd be like if they had super powers! Then, D.W. needs money, quick. When she tries to pull a fast one on the Tooth Fairy, will Arthur have to pay?

programme.title: Arthur: Falafelosophy/The Great Lint Rush
programme.desc: Sue Ellen tries her hand at writing and illustrating a graphic novel. Then, Mr. Toad is back! And he's ready to corner the Sock Market, leaving everyone in Elwood City barefoot and bereft.

programme.title: Arthur: Show Off/Dog's Best Friend
programme.desc: It's the Elwood City dog show and Killer is facing off against Sebastian Winkleplotz, the snooty, championship-winning poodle. Arthur agrees to watch Amigo while Alberto's off at camp, but Pal gets worried.

programme.title: Arthur: Just Desserts/The Big Dig
programme.desc: Arthur has a hard time resisting sweets, and one evening his overindulgence wins him an upset stomach and some 'Grimm' dreams. Arthur and D.W. loved it when Grandpa Dave came to visit--but now he only wants to sleep and play checkers.

programme.title: Arthur: Desert Island Dish/The Secret About Secrets
programme.desc: When Mr. Ratburn challenges the class to find the perfect food for surviving on a desert island, everyone picks potato chips or ice cream! D.W. is told a secret and quickly learns that keeping one is a lot harder than she thought.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Who's Your Neighbor?
programme.desc: Through pretend play, Barney and the children learn about their community and the people that help them live safely and happily there.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When he tries to join some older kids in jump-roping, Daniel fails miserably. He becomes convinced that he’s just too little to do anything right.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop forgets to say "please" and "thank you". Riff shares his dream of becoming an inventor.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Wonderful World of Colors and Shapes
programme.desc: Picture this! When Barney shows off his new painting, his friends are inspired to create their own art show. Discovering how to create new colors and draw shapes, Barney and his friends put on a super-dee-duper art show

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Parade of Bikes
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Baby Bop decide to get Halloween celebrations underway with a costume party. When Ramon loses his trick-or-treat candy, BJ shares his treats with Ramon.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Three kids try to build a pretend farm with disastrous results because they won't work together. Barney and his friends try to cheer up Olivia.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Sharing Is Caring!
programme.desc: The children bring toys to donate to Mr. Boyd's toy drive. Baby Bop and BJ arrive and after some convincing, Baby Bop learns about the merits of sharing.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Look What I Can Do
programme.desc: Barney's friends are playing a fun game of "I Can Do" where they each share something they can do. When BJ suggests having an "I Can Do" show, Baby Bop becomes worried.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Garbage In, Garbage Out
programme.desc: Unaware of the Decepticon activity, the Elite Guard take Optimus Prime and the Autobots back to Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Velocity
programme.desc: The AllSpark creates a new Autobot out of pieces of garbage.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Rise Of The Constructicons
programme.desc: Bumblebee competes against the Decepticons in an underground racing competition.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: A Fistful Of Energon
programme.desc: When the AllSpark turns construction vehicles into Autobots, Bulkhead becomes fast friends. However, the Decepticons have other plans in mind.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: S.U.V.: Society Of Ultimate Villainy
programme.desc: Prowl goes after Starscream when he escapes from the custody of the Elite Guard. However, he receives competition from Lockdown when Megatron offers a bounty on Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Autoboot Camp
programme.desc: The second-rate villains of Detroit team up to beat the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Black Friday
programme.desc: While chasing an Autobot traitor, Bumblebee thinks back on the time he spent with Bulkhead in the Autobot Boot Camp.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Sari, No One's Home
programme.desc: Unlikely matchups! It's Optimus Prime and Dinobot Grimlock vs. Blackarachnia and Meltdown.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: A Bridge Too Close, Part 1
programme.desc: Sari has to defend the Autobot home base from invading Constructicons.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: A Bridge Too Close, Part 2
programme.desc: Megatron comes up with a plan to build a space bridge to Cybertron. However, he needs to capture Bulkhead, an expert space bridge mechanic, in order to build the bridge. Megatron's ultimate goal is to take over Cybertron and eventually the universe.

programme.title: 2014 FIFA World Cup
programme.desc: After surviving a tense semifinal decided by penalty kicks, Argentina must face Germany, fresh off its rout of Brazil, to determine which team will lift the World Cup trophy. From Maracana Stadium in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.

programme.title: Property Brothers: John & Christine

programme.title: Property Brothers: Kieron & Emma
programme.desc: Clothing designers Emma and Kieron are on the hunt for a downtown property with spacious modern interiors and vintage charm. The only problem is their dream home visions are completely out of step with their budget.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Stefan & Owen
programme.desc: Stefan and Owen dream of finding a Victorian home with high ceilings, hardwood floors and a big backyard. Until they do they're crashing at a friend's place. With their expectations they may be living there permanently.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Matt & Aleya

programme.title: Property Brothers: Stephen & Julie

programme.title: Property Brothers: Julie & Peter
programme.desc: With their blended family of three children, Julie and Peter are hoping to find a sprawling four-bedroom home where they can put down roots. They've got a long wish list and a limited budget.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury

programme.desc: Ollie tries to ask Amelia out, but a miscommunication leads to Amelia thinking he doesn't like her.

programme.desc: The other Morphin Masters are angry that the Green Morphin Master broke their vow to never intervene in mortal affairs, but when the Rangers and the Green Morphin Master work together to fight evil, the other Morphin Masters have a change of heart.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and his friend get trapped in an ice tunnel. Pingu and two friends meet for a toboggan race. Pingu has to rush to the loo because he has drunk too much. Robby slips into the school ice-hole.

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu hurts his beak while playing. At school, Pingu is irritated to find the new girl penguin seems to have taken a shine to him. Pingu is plagued by a mischievous seagull. Pingu goes ice surfing.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and Pingi want to have their first kiss. Pingu and Robby are curling. Pingu and his family are preparing for Christmas. Pingu and his friends, Hugo and Robby, are playing hide-and-seek.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and his sister practise cooking. Pingu goes to see his aunt who lives in another village. Pingu is playing at being a photographer. Pingu and his sister need help from their parents.

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu has the task of looking after the twins. Pingu has some bad luck while bowling. Pingu and his friend play practical jokes using a fish on a string. Father drives over Pingu's sister's toy pram.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu visits his injured sister in hospital. The class outing takes them to see a sculptor. Pingu accompanies his sister to the nursery. Only Pingu is curious when strangers pass through the village.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Mother and Father wish to go to a concert. Pingu and his sister help with the tedious household chores. Pingu, his sister, and Robby build an enormous snowman. Pingu plays with wooden blocks.

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy fetches the others to watch Andy Brown and some children looking at Peacocks. The magical tree appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children taking photographs of each other's faces. Dipsy has a good look around Teletubbyland when a telescope appears.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Two children are making Christmas crackers for each other. Dipsy is very pleased to find his present is a cracker. He looks for someone to pull the cracker.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa walks up to say “Eh-oh”. Then she goes to find Po, Dipsy and Tinky Winky and brings them in to say “Eh-oh” too. The windmill turns and the Tubbies watch a group of children go paddling in the sea.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and some children watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the Naughty Pig. Dipsy's hat keeps blowing away and he has to chase it all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children dancing while King Pleasure and the Biscuit Boys play Hickory Dickory Dock. A voice trumpet appears and sings Hickory Dickory Dock.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies walk in sideways, then run off to watch a little boy play cricket with his dad. In Teletubbyland,Tinky Winky runs away with Laa-Laa’s ball. Laa-Laa chases after him, through the house, over the hills and behind the trees.

programme.title: Roads and Bridges
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Bob is going On Site! Join Bob and his Can-Do crew as they explore real life construction sites. See diggers, mixers and trucks work together to build roads and bridges.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s a big day. The team are building Farmer Pickles new factory which will turn sunflowers into sunflower oil. Everyone is excited to meet Marjorie, who arrives by bicycle. Marjorie has been brought on board by Farmer Pickles to manage the factory.

programme.title: Knights of Can-A-Lot
programme.desc: Bob, Wendy and the team get a big surprise when Bob's father Robert comes to visit. When stern Ms Chalmers from the National Heritage asks Bob to renovate the old castle a case of mistaken identity leaves Bob’s father in charge!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s a blistering hot day on Sunflower Valley. Bob and Wendy have got to finish building their workshop – making the workbenches and installing the power tools – it’s an inside job so the machines all get the day off.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is demolishing an old house, and sends the floorboards and roof tiles for recycling. As he finishes the job, he gets a call from Mr Bentley who wants him to renovate the museum’s annexe, where Mr Ellis plans to exhibit the work of local artists.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop is keen to enter the town’s snowman competition, but a burst pipe outside Mr Sabatini’s needs fixing. Scoop is anxious when he sees the snowman that Mr Sabatini has made for the competition.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles is about to declare his Sunflower Oil business open, but there’s just one more job that he needs Bob to do. He needs a depot to store all the bottles of oil.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: An old Willow tree has toppled over and needs to be chopped down. Lofty and Bob are going to make it safe and use the wood for other things. Meanwhile Travis and Sumsy wonder why they haven’t got a shelter of their own like Bob’s machines.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is tiling a roof and calls at JJ’s yard to pick up the materials. But there is only one pallet of the requisite red tiles in stock, so JJ promises to send the remainder of the order as soon as his delivery arrives.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Its early morning and there’s a strange creature in Sunflower Valley. First of all it visits the Homestead and then Scarecrow Cottage scaring Sumsy and Travis. It’s something big and hairy, but gets frightened away by Scrambler carrying Baz.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Today’s the day that the machines get to build their brand new shelter. It’s going to be built into the side of a hill and made using found materials. Lofty, who slept outside at the old yard, decides that he’d like a place in the new shelter.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s a big day, as the team are building Bob’s new workshop at his new yard. Scoop is desperate to get stuck in and beavers about doing everything he can to help. Bob needs some old floorboards collecting from Bobsville, and sends Scoop to pick them up.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a goat run for Farmer Pickles new goat – Giddy. It’s Travis’s job to collect Giddy from Meg MacDonald the goat breeder. Spud teases Travis about being slow and Travis resolves to collect the goat very quickly.

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Someone watching
programme.desc: In this episode the team investigate a building where a phantom soldier has been seen. Reports also include poltergeist activity, a spectral child, and a malevolent entity. And one team member ends up needing medical attention…but who?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: The World's End
programme.desc: In this season finale, the team return to a venue which sees Jane and Dale witness a very strange incident. Phil and Ben are plagued by phantom footsteps, along with Sara and Jane. And Dale gets the shock of his life. But which venue is it?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Did you just say something?"
programme.desc: In the very first episode of Are You Haunted..? the team travels to North Yorkshire. Amongst other things, they investigate a ghostly photograph taken by a member of the public. What will the team uncover during their overnight paranormal investigation?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "That's so freaky!"
programme.desc: In this episode of Are You Haunted..? the team travels to Stockport to investigate stories of shadow figures, phantom voices, mysterious figures, and more. Will they encounter anything paranormal?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "It came from near the door!"
programme.desc: The 'Are You Haunted' team travel to South Yorkshire to investigate a haunted building that dates to the late 18th century. With reports of a mysterious figure being seen, footsteps being heard, and possible poltergeist activity, how will they get on?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Psychics Revealed - Special
programme.desc: Behind the scenes with the psychics on the show.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where's Grandad?
programme.desc: 65-year-old Alan Gordon Woodford of Bedford St. Mossburn left his home on foot Saturday morning April 20, 1985 and was never seen or heard of again.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: In 1957, nine-year-old Peter Boland was on holiday having the time of his life on a remote farm in New Zealand when he simply vanished without a trace. Peter’s older brother Gavin Boland, a self-confessed sceptic, turns to Sensing Murder’s psychics.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken Out
programme.desc: Was Donovan Reidy deliberately run down and left to die? In 1995, 23-year-old Donovan Reidy was at a party when he got into a fight. A short while later, his bloodied body was found on the side of a major New Zealand highway.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Empire State Haunt
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, Taps heads to Fort William Henry located in Lake George, New York, where Ghost Hunters Academy winner Adam Berry joins the team.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Sloss Furnaces
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Alabama to investigate Sloss Furnaces, a 50-acre industrial plantoperating from 1882 until the 1970s.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: TAPS Meets the Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: The Ghost Hunters enlist the help of Bravo's The Real Housewives of Atlanta as they embark on this week's investigation.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Knickerbocker
programme.desc: PRS checks into the Knickerbocker Hotel in Linesville, Pennsylvania where the owners are reporting strange noises and the appearance of phantom children in some of the rooms.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dwelling of the Dead
programme.desc: A single mom claims she is being physically assaulted by a spirit in her Kentucky home. Ryan first explores a natural explanation for the alleged phenomena. But the client's five-year-old son also sees spirits, and his sightings appear to line up.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Permission To Do Harm
programme.desc: When a mirror levitates and shatters on its own, P.R.S. heeds the call to investigate a spirit that has been unleashed on an unsuspecting family. Ryan must track down the spirit and contain it before it does irreparable damage.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lady Vampire
programme.desc: PRS investigates a case involving single mom, Dawn, and her 5-year-old daughter, both of whom are tormented by the appearance of a hag they call "lady vampire."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Boy Pushed Me
programme.desc: Bruce and Danielle are terrified by an EVP recorded in their Indiana home stating "Kill them." Even more chilling, their toddler son survived a fall out of a window only to tell his parents, "Boy pushed me."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: When Paula's young autistic son Michael, with limited verbal skills uttered the words "Go away scary dead boy" -- it sent a chill up her spine.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Get Out of This House
programme.desc: When an aggressive spirit stalks a young family, PRS is called in to investigate. When it is determined that the source of the haunting may have been unknowingly invited in, Ryan races to identify and hopefully defeat the entity before it's too late.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Pet Cemetery
programme.desc: Ryan and his team investigate the bizarre haunting of a woman and her dog in Waterboro, Maine. The Labrador was chewing at her own fur and standing on guard on the bed, growling at unseen figures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Cemetery
programme.desc: PRS visits a gothic graveyard, where a jealous spirit seems to be preying on the newlywed wife of the cemetery's caretaker. Ryan traces the haunting to a mysterious, unclaimed cremation urn on the grounds.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shadow Caster
programme.desc: PRS investigates an Alabama home where clients, Georgiana and her two daughters, are so terrified, they moved out after only 18 months. They have seen shadow figures, been touched and have a recorded EVP stating, "Look at me, get out of here."

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Glove
programme.desc: When a terrifying haunting threatens to break a Daisytown, PA couple apart, PRS is their last resort. As the investigation deepens, PRS and the family learn that it's just the tip of iceberg, turns out this haunting might be all in the family.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Croxteth Hall Part 1
programme.desc: The team take on one of the grandest properties in Great Britain, Liverpool’s Croxteth Hall in a non-stop two-hour heart pounding investigation.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Croxteth Hall Part 2
programme.desc: We stay with the team and find out what happened after we left them last time. The team seem to be stalked by something…but what.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Rowleys House
programme.desc: The team head to the centre of Shrewsbury and a large building that is all but empty.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Fleece Inn
programme.desc: This old pup in the heart of West Yorkshire is said to be one of the Most Haunted places in England.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Haden Hill House Part 1
programme.desc: An old house in England’s West Midlands gives the Most Haunted team a night they will never forget.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Haden Hill House Part 2
programme.desc: The strange occurrences at Hayden Hill House switch up a gear as whatever is there seems now to be stalking the team with some terrifying results, at least for some of the crew it is proving too much.

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: A woman's life becomes embroiled in a huge military cover-up when it's revealed her husband is not who he says he is.

programme.title: King Of California
programme.desc: Commercial airline pilot Whip Whitaker (Denzel Washington) has a problem with drugs and alcohol, though so far he's managed to complete his flights safely.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former prot‚g‚ to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: In A Day
programme.desc: A young woman spends a curiously unpredictable day with a stranger.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the devil who slyly promises to do just that — for a price.

programme.title: Mortdecai
programme.desc: Depp, Paltrow, and McGregor star in this globe-trotting comedy about an unlikely team recruited to find a stolen, priceless painting.

programme.title: The Buddy Holly Story
programme.desc: The story of the life and career of the early rock and roll singer, from his meteoric rise to stardom, to his marriage and untimely death.

programme.title: The Revenge of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein escapes from the guillotine and goes to Germany. There, he names himself Dr. Stein and plans to restart his gruesome experiments. Starring: Peter Cushing, Francis Matthews, Eunice Gayson

programme.title: Hitler The Last Ten Days
programme.desc: Alec Guinness plays Adolf Hitler in this chilling dramatization of the last days of the Third Reich. Trapped in the Berlin bunker with his mistress and high command, Hitler comes apart...

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Green Is the Color of Gold
programme.desc: Newlyweds strike it rich with the discovery of borax.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Dress for a Desert Girl
programme.desc: A desert dwelling couple struggle with life in Death Valley.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The Friend
programme.desc: An inexperienced young man hears about a planned ambush on the sheriff and vows to help.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The Indiana Girl
programme.desc: A tomboy changes her ways when she meets the handsome constable of a mining town.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The Informer Who Cried
programme.desc: A condemned outlaw is offered his freedom if he helps capture his criminal friend.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The Girl Who Walked the West
programme.desc: The story of Sacajawea, the Native woman who helped explorers Lewis and Clark.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Chicken Bill
programme.desc: A prospector tries to swindle a silver baron.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Major Horace Bell
programme.desc: Robert Taylor portrays Major Horace Bell, a Los Angeles attorney who defends a man falsely accused of murder.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The Man Who Wouldn't Die
programme.desc: A psychic leads the way to rescue ambush survivors.

programme.title: Resistance
programme.desc: Based on the acclaimed novel. 1944: The D-Day landings have failed, and the German Wehrmacht has invaded Britain. The country is now under enemy occupation. In a remote valley in the Black Mountains of Wales, the women awake to discover the men are gone.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: When Nathan (Taylor Lautner) discovers the parents who raised him aren't his real folks, he begins to uncover unsettling secrets that trigger events and leave him running for his life.

programme.title: Triple Cross: Triple Cross
programme.desc: During WW2, convicted bank robber Eddie Chapman becomes a triple agent working for both the British and the Germans.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Socialite Molly is released from prison after serving a 6-year sentence for the murder of her husband and sets out to prove her innocence with the help of Fran, an investigative reporter who uncovers a conspiracy of silence and a shocking secret.

programme.title: Love You To Death
programme.desc: Talented attorney Yasmine Winter freezes in court, and her mistake allows a murderer go free. Her boss orders her to take a sabbatical but secretly, Yasmine plans to use the time away to rebuild the case she just lost.

programme.title: A Sister’s Obsession
programme.desc: Kendra’s life couldn’t be more perfect – she has a loving husband, supportive best friend, and a blossoming career… and she was just awarded the title of "Educator of the Year."

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: A young farmer sets out to recruit mercenaries to defend his peaceful planet, which is under threat of invasion by the evil tyrant Sador and his armada of aggressors. Starring: George Peppard, Robert Vaughn, Richard Thomas

programme.title: Robot Apocalypse
programme.desc: When expert hacker Tara tries to stop a powerful, sentient A.I. as it takes over the world's military, the A.I. marks her as a terrorist.

programme.title: Tornado Warning
programme.desc: Aliens attack Earth, using deadly electrical tornadoes as weapons. A farmer, his brilliant high school daughter, and a tornado blogger race against the clock to find a way to thwart the horrific invasion.

programme.title: The Four Warriors
programme.desc: Travelling home, four soldiers discover a village gripped by fear, as residents are abducted by unknown predators. These warriors set out to rescue them and destroy what lurks outside the village.

programme.title: The Secret Garden
programme.desc: Experience the magical world of 'The Secret Garden' as never before in this beautiful production of the classic tale. When her parents are lost in a tragic accident, Mary must seek comfort in the strange and forgotten corridors of Misselthwaite Factory.

programme.title: Space Warriors
programme.desc: Desperate to follow in the footsteps of his absent astronaut father, 13-year-old Jimmy's dreams come true when he wins one of five opportunities to compete for a scholarship to Space Camp.

programme.title: Windstorm
programme.desc: Rebel teen Mika encounters a beautiful, wild stallion named Windstorm at her grandmother's riding school and learns she can communicate with horses.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Skull
programme.desc: The Skull decides to resurrect all of the world's villains, beginning with a mummy.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Weatherman
programme.desc: The Weatherman causes a national blizzard in the middle of summer and demands that U.S. citizens unanimously elect him president.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Lawrence of Moravia
programme.desc: Frank and Bruce are captured by a sheik who's been stealing plumbing supplies just for the thrill of it.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Albert/Alberta
programme.desc: As dual-gendered Albert/Alberta begins melting glaciers in a plot to flood the world, he/she attempts to complete a collection of animals, which is missing a male werewolf and a male vampire.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Queen Bee
programme.desc: Dracula infiltrates the Queen Bee's hive in an effort to thwart a worldwide bee invasion.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Mr. Mephisto
programme.desc: Confusion abounds when Mr. Mephisto replaces Mayor Goldwyn with a lookalike doll who spouts off radical opinions.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Tickler
programme.desc: The Tickler passes off counterfeit bills in an attempt to lure the Monster Squad into a trap.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Ringmaster
programme.desc: The Ringmaster holds children hostage as part of a larger scheme to buy out and close down all of the toy stores in America.

programme.title: Carnival of Souls
programme.desc: After a traumatic accident, a woman becomes drawn to a mysterious abandoned carnival.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team unravels three twisted tales of love in a trio of separate murder cases.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A riot threatens to break out at a Manhattan precinct.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Adam witnesses a murder online while participating in a webchat with a stranger.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A decomposed body is found on a rooftop.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A sniper begins a campaign of random shootings in the city.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac continues the investigation into the murder of Chief Carver's sister.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: New evidence appears that may prove a convicted murderer's innocence.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A murder suspect tries to throw the CSIs off his trail.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the murder of a man during his ex-wife's divorce party.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a flight attendant is murdered, a pilot, a marshal and stalker are all in the frame.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a finalist in a reality show in murdered, the team look at the other contestants.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: In Part One of a Two-Part crossover episode to conclude on Without A Trace, a kidnap victim from New York who went missing six years ago may be the same boy whose death Grissom and the CSI team are investigating in Las Vegas.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A suspect from Sara's past returns, causing her to question her future as a CSI.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Warrick's addiction to pills begins to impact his job when his investigation into the underground mob in Vegas results in him being targeted as the prime suspect in a mob-related murder case.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Hodges has ulterior motives when he stages hypothetical murders in the lab to give his colleagues a chance to play CSI.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and his team delve into the world of illegal dog fighting to find out who is responsible for the death of a wealthy socialite.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate two murders that take place at the annual bull riding rodeo in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Scorpion: Nuke Kids on the Block
programme.desc: While decommissioning an old nuclear missile, a simple accident causes Team Scorpion to endure exposure to toxic vapor while trying to prevent the nuke from detonating.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sci Hard
programme.desc: While attending a tech convention, Team Scorpion is taken hostage by a group attempting a virtual heist.

programme.title: Scorpion: Queen Scary
programme.desc: At Halloween, Team Scorpion takes on a case to prove the existence of ghosts on the Queen Mary but find an all-too-real disaster when they locate a 'ghost ship' on a deadly collision course.

programme.title: Scorpion: Go With the Florence
programme.desc: While tracking a device that can prevent a nuclear meltdown through the Los Angeles sewers, Walter learns the nuances of listening and not offering advice to Paige.

programme.title: Scorpion: Faire is Foul
programme.desc: For Sylvester's birthday, Team Scorpion visits a renaissance festival, but the revelry is cut short when a group tries to rob a nearby police evidence locker.

programme.title: Scorpion: It's Raining Men (Of War)
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving, Team Scorpion's new neighbor, Florence \, joins them at sea on a mission to destroy a floating island of trash, but her flawed contribution leaves her, Walter and Happy stranded on the quickly dissolving island.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: "Moving Day"
programme.desc: 15 Division is assigned to a community outreach program, “Moving Day”, to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fragments
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet. But personal feelings get thrust aside when a bomb explodes in a downtown parking garage

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Everlasting
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division work to track down TED MCDONALD (the car-bomber from Ep. 510). But even after catching him, they realize Ted has more targets set to explode out there. The clock is ticking

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Open Windows
programme.desc: Andy is attacked by an intruder at Traci’s place and the Sex Crimes Unit steps in to take over the case their way, 15 Division will have decide whether to take matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Perfect Family
programme.desc: Andy’s ideas about what makes a perfect family are put into perspective when she meets an out-of-control teen who needs to be protected from her own conservative family.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Uprising
programme.desc: A riot breaks out at a women’s correctional institute while Andy, Juliet, Nick, and Gail are there to transfer prisoners. They end up in a lock-down situation that finds Andy and Juliet trapped with a woman desperate to prove her innocence

programme.title: Superfire
programme.desc: Smoke jumpers and tanker pilots try to save stranded teens and an entire Oregon town from three raging fires.

programme.title: Only the Brave
programme.desc: The Granite Mountain Hotshots become one of the most elite firefighting teams in the country. Watching over lives, homes and everything people hold dear, they forge a unique brotherhood that comes into focus with one fateful fire in Yarnell, Ariz.

programme.title: Super Storm
programme.desc: A high-school student creates a science project that holds the key to saving the Earth from devastating cyclones.

programme.title: The Secret Place
programme.desc: A beautiful redhead becomes involved with a small-time gang of hoodlums who plan and perform a daring diamond robbery.

programme.title: Hamlet
programme.desc: Hamlet, Prince of Denmark, is in mourning for his dead father, the king. He's also disturbed by how quickly his mother, Gertrude, has remarried.

programme.title: The Spanish Gardener
programme.desc: Rather undiplomatic British diplomat Harrington Brande takes up his new post in Spain accompanied by his son Nicholas He becomes increasingly jealous of the relationship that develops between his son and the Spanish gardener hired for his estate.

programme.title: Medium: Once In A Lifetime
programme.desc: When Ariel begins dating a boy from school, Allison has visions that indicate he may be involved in a local murder.

programme.title: Medium: The Future's So Bright
programme.desc: After strangely becoming sensitive to light, Allison wears a pair of sunglasses that display strange numbers which may be related to people's life expectancies.

programme.title: Medium: You Give Me Fever
programme.desc: Allison's visions become a vital source of information to the authorities after samples of a deadly disease disappear. Meanwhile, Scanlon thinks he's ready to ask Lynn to marry him.

programme.title: Medium: An Everlasting Love
programme.desc: The prime suspect in a serial killer case dies, and the police are convinced he's the guilty party. When the dead suspect contacts Allison, he tells her that he's innocent and agrees to help her find the real killer.

programme.title: Medium: Dear Dad...
programme.desc: As the anniversary of Devalos' daughter's death come to pass, Devalos is haunted by memories of the traumatic event. Meanwhile, Allison has dreams of the extreme measures Devalos went to put his daughter's killer in jail.

programme.title: Medium: Psych
programme.desc: Allison dreams about a schizophrenic child, but when she meets her in real life, she seems perfectly normal -- but has a mentally ill roommate.

programme.title: JAG: Mixed Messages
programme.desc: An intruder shoots three Navy people, killing two. One of the dead is a friend of Harm, who protects his reputation. Webb, counter-espionage, and disinformation are involved; Bud solves it. Mac and Renee return to town; Mac leaves again.

programme.title: JAG: Ambush
programme.desc: Capt. Shepard leads his troop off its peacekeeping mission and into battle with the colonel of the rebel forces. Consequently, six marines die in the public incident. Harm is sent in to investigate despite a recent touch of bad luck in a string of trials.

programme.title: JAG: Jag-a-thon
programme.desc: The JAG gang takes part in a JAGathon, a charity-benefit marathon, which provides opportunities for personal pride and individual competitiveness. Sturgis feels uncertain, and Harm defends a sailor for impersonating an officer.

programme.title: JAG: The Mission
programme.desc: A spotter on the ground calls for an airstrike as he has identified 15 heavily armed suspected Al Qaeda members on horseback. JAG won’t approve the airstrike until the spotter is absolutely certain the men are Al Qaeda members.

programme.title: JAG: Defending His Honor
programme.desc: An ambulance pulls up to a crash site where a woman, Jennifer Wilson, is found injured and crying for her baby. Unbeknownst to her, the six-month-old baby died in the accident. A Navy judge stands accused of vehicular homicide.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One believes they are stopping a robbery in progress unaware that part of the robbers' plan is to escape their cruel leader. Their plan could make them his next victims and the team has to try to keep the robbers from harm.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One discovers that they need to take new security measures to protect the system they use to follow crimes after they are given acces to a crime about to happen.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One's efforts to save a kidnapped woman's life are dependent in large part on the abductor's brother, who holds a dark family secret.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One confronts a man desperate to keep the promise he made to his deaf nephew by protecting the only place the boy has ever felt safe.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The team is called in when a car bomb explodes at a kid's birthday party. As it turns out the victim of the explosion was the head of a local biker community which is already under investigation.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The team tries to help a young man with amazing memory who is taken hostage to help get to a weapon with smart bullets which can shoot a target even behind cover.

programme.title: Upside Down
programme.desc: Adam (Jim Sturgess, "Cloud Atlas") and Eden (Kirsten Dunst), a pair of star-crossed lovers separated onto twin worlds with opposite gravity, risk everything to reconnect.

programme.title: King Of California
programme.desc: Commercial airline pilot Whip Whitaker (Denzel Washington) has a problem with drugs and alcohol, though so far he's managed to complete his flights safely.

programme.title: Love and Honor
programme.desc: While fighting in Vietnam, Dalton hears his girlfriend has dumped him so decides to fly to get her back. AWOL from the war zone, he has seven days to get back to the US, change his girlfriend's mind and make it back to Vietnam without anyone noticing

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Cold Blood Warm Hearts / The Spider and the Files
programme.desc: Kristin drives out to a small fishing community to investigate a local sighting of a sea monster. / Sixteen year old Simon's fascination with spiders becomes a nightmare when his turn of the century town is infested with arachnids of every variety.

programme.desc: Selfish eight year old Shauna doesn't like to share, especially with her five year old sister Katie.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Mr. Mephisto
programme.desc: Confusion abounds when Mr. Mephisto replaces Mayor Goldwyn with a lookalike doll who spouts off radical opinions.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Tickler

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Ringmaster

programme.title: Monster Squad

programme.title: Monster Squad: No Face
programme.desc: Mayor Goldwyn gives the deed to the city to Chief Running Nose, and then he declares all crime legal. Before long, the Monster Squad discovers No Face has been masquerading as both of them.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Parsley Smith, a teller of tall tales, claims the new town banker is plotting to make off with the depositors' money.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: It's Christmas in Dodge and Chester isn't pleased when his brother Magnus arrives for a visit (Robert Easton appears). One of very few times a radio episode was adapted to TV with the same guest actor playing the role in both media.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A beautiful young wife (Lola Albright) manipulates a young hired hand into killing her older husband.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A peddler's miracle curative contains opium and proves fatal.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A man who claims he's innocent of a murder in a corrupt town breaks out of Matt's jail, and his trail leads Matt to the corrupt sheriff (Mort Mills appears).

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A woman offers a $1,000 reward to the man who kills Matt Dillon.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Witnesses are refusing to testify against an infamous outlaw.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt saves the life of a white boy raised by Indians who was shot trying to retrieve horses stolen from his tribe.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: With his son in prison and his grandson dead — both as a result of McGarrett's actions, the patriarch of the Vashon crime syndicate, old Dominick, devises a cunning scheme to frame the chief of Five-O and send him to prison in disgrace.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Khigh Dhiegh returns as the sinister criminal genius Wo Fat to match wits with McGarrett. A petty criminal is slain during the theft of a secret ballistic missile device, and McGarrett suspects that his arch nemesis, Wo Fat, is behind the theft.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Andy Griffith and Joyce Van Patten pay a husband-and-wife team of confidence operators who get caught between two of the islands' most powerful mobs, almost touching off a war among competing underworld factions.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: An infant is taken from his stroller on a Honolulu street as McGarrett and his Five-O forces wait unsuccessfully for a ransom demand in order to trap the kidnappers.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Patty Duke and Carol Lawrence are the guest stars as McGarrett goes after the untouchable king-pin of narcotics traffic in the islands.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver goes undercover to investigate the theft of a valuable sonar detecting device.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver gets drawn in to a wacky woman's struggle to keep a vintage violin out of the hands of opportunistic criminals.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is called on to investigate the kidnapping of a wealthy industrialist's daughter.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver has a ghostly encounter while fighting for his life in a hospital bed.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: Rawhide

programme.title: Rawhide

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: When drover Charlie "Rabbit" Waters accidentally kills a disreputable townsman, the victim's brothers, three gunmen and Brother William, swear vengeance.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A confidence man is aided by the drovers and promptly shows his gratitude by stealing the ownership papers of the herd.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Trail boss Gil Favor hires a hunter to protect his herd from an escaped circus lion the hunter is tracking down.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine suddenly starts getting mysterious love letters. When she becomes intrigued by the poetic propositions, a couple of cabbies quickly claim responsibility, leaving Elaine with the hilarious task of discovering who is the amorous writer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie makes a horrible first impression on girlfriend Zena’s parents on Taxi. Louie’s romance with girlfriend Zena takes an outrageous twist when she brings him home to meet her parents.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies try to make Tony a family man when they convince him to adopt the adorably precocious eight-year-old boy named Brian whom he befriended.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a hilarious shock to the cabbies when Rev. Jim brings his new pet to the garage—an over-the-hill racehorse that he bought after cashing in on the 300-to-1 long shot. However, he soon finds that it’s impossible to housebreak a horse.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby faces a humorous predicament when it becomes obvious that one of the biggest talent managers in New York is representing him because of his prowess as a lover, and not for his ability as an actor.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a hilarious caper, Louie and the cabbies pool all their cash to buy a painting at an auction, planning to cash in big when the artist dies—but when the bidding gets too heavy, the gang turns a dignified auction into a frolicking free-for-all.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica, Tess and Andrew help a young man lost in a life or death struggle with what seems to be a case of split personality, but turns out to be something far more sinister.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: A driven newspaper editor must choose between a shocking front page headline or her own sister's reputation.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.desc: The Angels must help a troubled young boy who wants to divorce his parents.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: After finding the body of a young girl in a stream located in the suburbs of Montreal, investigators strive to retrace a murderer who knew how to use water to his advantage.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mother's Intuition
programme.desc: 14-year-old Pamela Bischoff misses her curfew on April 12, 1991. Though she has only been missing a few hours, her mother, Gail, tells the Oromocto RCMP she is certain Pamela has been raped and murdered by an older boy named Billy Stillman.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: Following the gruesome discovery of a skeleton transported by water on an island, several detectives are challenged as they seek to unravel the unsolved mystery of the woman with no name.

programme.desc: The story of a young girl savagely beaten by a group of teenagers and later found dead in a river leads to a troubling inquiry whereby water causes several complications as well as the solution to the case.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Tayler's mum Jane comes back to Drovers but Tayler doesn't want to see her; Ingrid moves in with Marcus; Lily tells Frank she wants to live with her mother.

programme.desc: Tess tries to realize some cash from Drovers Run without hurting Claire. One of the shearers Claire hired disappears; did he leave because his wife was in labor, or was he murdered?

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: Don't Mess With The Girls
programme.desc: It's time for the annual rodeo. Claire wants to ride Jack's horse Sirocco to a championship, and Tess tries to get Becky to report being raped.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: Who's The Boss
programme.desc: Claire buys a herd of thin sheep at an auction to fatten up and resell. Jodi finds she did badly on her examination. Tess applies her mother's therapist techniques to encourage the women at Drovers Run to open up emotionally and bond.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 10
programme.desc: Du Plessis is restless after his heart surgery but the family insist he needs to relax. Meanwhile Danny and Alice are happy to have closed down a zoo down that has been mistreating animals.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 1
programme.desc: While on honeymoon in London, Alice discovers that Danny has some final business to do before they can return home to Africa. He's reluctantly arranged to meet his estranged father, Robert, who has recently got back in touch.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: Danny is throwing himself into his work after the death of his father, and has applied for the role of State Vet. However, Danny's attempts to involve Thabo in the first phase of the Lion Breeding Project lead to Du Plessis feeling like an outsider.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: Danny's first big project as State Vet is a major animal translocation, and he is desperate to impress. Meanwhile, whilst Alice is out in the bush treating an injured zebra, she is stalked by lions. She makes it back to her jeep in time but is shaken up.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: Alice is still suffering from a loss of nerve after her close shave with the lions and so Danny tries to help her overcome her problems – the Leopard's Den lions have produced their first cub and he needs Alice back in the saddle.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Wade's dream man becomes a nightmare when his attention to her becomes obsessive and he tries to prevent her from sliding.
