programme.desc: Challenger comes face to face with an old friend from England, Dr. William Hargrove. Summerlee, Malone, and Marguerite agree to help the Queen of the nymphs and fairies break a curse.

programme.title: The Lost World: Time After Time
programme.desc: While hunting, Roxton and Veronica come across two individuals from the future. One becomes keen on using Marguerite to lead him to riches, and the other is set on stopping that from happening.

programme.title: The Lost World: Prodigal Father
programme.desc: The explorers find trouble when they help save and aid a man they believe is Veronica's long lost father on the run from Kartas, a bounty hunter.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E2 - Suns And Lovers
programme.desc: Moya docks at a commerce station so the crew can spend some of their money. Disaster strikes when the station is hit by a storm.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E3 - Self Inflicted Wounds, Part 1: Could'a, Would'a, Should'a
programme.desc: Moya approaches a wormhole, gets pulled in and fused to another ship.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E4 - Self Inflicted Wounds, Part 2: Wait For The Wheel
programme.desc: The crew works out a way of getting free from the other ship and out of the wormhole.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E5 - Different Destinations
programme.desc: Stark accidentally sends himself, Crichton, Aeryn. D'Argo and Jool are back in time where they alter the timeline.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E6 - Eat Me
programme.desc: In need of supplies, Crichton lands his transport pod on a dying leviathan which is full of hungry cannibals.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 88
programme.desc: Myths tested: Do birds flying in a trailer cause the trailer to become lighter? Will a boat crashing into a channel marker cleave itself in half?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 86
programme.desc: Every so often, the MythBusters draw conclusions that leave the fans seething. It’s time for the MythBusters to put more of their most contentious outcomes under the microscope.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 96
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is it possible to climb a building with a motorized grappling hook? Will getting punched by someone wearing a ring leave a ring-shaped imprint?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 93
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can sacrificially jumping on a grenade save others' lives? Does self-hypnosis work? Can a combination of Diet Coke and Mentos make one's stomach explode?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 102
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is it possible to use a rowboat as a submarine? Can one escape if buried in the sand? What kind of projectiles would pirates use in a cannon if they run out of cannonballs?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A rifle in a shopping mall, a syringe of potassium chloride and a syringe of insulin, each in the hands of a mentally disturbed woman, lead to the tragic end of many lives.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Teen Killers
programme.desc: They were too young to drink or vote but they were not too young to commit the most brutal of crimes. Some were driven by pure curiosity: how would it feel to take a life?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Judi Buenoano secretly murdered lovers to claim on insurance policies whilst nurse Genene Jones secretly killed at least 46 infants left in her care between 1980 and 1982.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: No one doubts a woman’s capacity to love, but sometimes lust can turn lethal. In the ultimate fatal attraction, "Deadly Women" looks at cases of murder driven by obsessive love.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Love can be beautiful, love can be blind and love can be deadly. Desire and jealousy are powerful forces driving women to dark and horrifying places in their minds.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death in Alaska
programme.desc: The day began like any other for Cheryl and Paul Chapman, until the silence of a peaceful Sunday morning was shattered with a phone call.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Temple of Fear
programme.desc: In Miami, the discovery of a mutilated body sent investigators on the trail of a deadly cult. But agents found a wall of silence around the cult's members. Potential witnesses, terrified of reprisals, refused to talk.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Radical Agenda
programme.desc: In the 1970's a string of bank robberies and bombings spread fear and destruction along the east coast. The FBI faced a new breed of criminal, the domestic terrorist.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Abroad
programme.desc: Beginning in 1990, Europe found itself in the clutches of a serial killer. He became an international outlaw, hopping from country to country to evade capture and to kill again.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Search For Lisa Rene
programme.desc: When a young woman was grabbed from her Texas home, the police raced to find her abductors. On the face of it, the kidnapping seemed like the random act of desperate men.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man
programme.desc: Jackie’s family doesn't trust her boyfriend around her children, but she insists on staying with him. What horrible truth will Shaqualla's lie detector test reveal about her man?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA Shockers
programme.desc: Monique and Ashley find out who their newborn babies' fathers are on today's Steve Wilkos Show!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Mommy Hurt Me
programme.desc: Stephanie’s drug addiction led her to neglect and abuse her kids. Scott’s fiancée stepped up as a mother and Stephanie failed multiple drug tests, he doesn’t want her near the kids, but wants her to atone for her wrongs!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: 13-Year-Old Father?
programme.desc: Curtis sat down with his mother Telisha, and told her that he is trying to have a baby but Telisha was shocked and terrified because Curtis is only 13 years old! Curtis insists he is ready to be a father.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Slept With THAT Man?
programme.desc: LaShawna and her boyfriend James will learn if her friend Coral harmed her child years ago. She’ll also admit that she cheated with Coral. How will he react when he finds out another bombshell?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?
programme.desc: At 17, Janelle's infant son died from serious injuries. She was sentenced to 3 years in prison for reckless homicide, but claims she's innocent. What will her polygraph results say?

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Watson claims that he was hit in the eye by Albert Higgins a half hour after he had watched him die.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes in Washington
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson travel to Washington D.C. in order to prevent a secret document from falling into enemy hands.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Dr. Watson becomes involved in investigating the murder of Harry Chelton

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: 'Escape artist' Crocker, escapes from the police to ask Holmes to clear him from a murder charge.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's famous detective faces the ultimate challenge when enormous monsters attack London.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Soldier Stories
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Identity
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Broken Trust
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Dead In The Water
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Betrayed
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: With the grand finale just around the corner, the remaining chefs are challenged to replicate a sample dish using taste, texture and sight alone. The winner is rewarded with a $1,000 shopping spree before another taxing evening service begins.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay presides over the penultimate episode of the US cooking competition as this year's explosive series nears its climax. Three contestants soon become two as Gordon names the second finalist.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay presides over the final episode of the US cooking competition as this year's explosive series reaches its climax. Gordon informs Mary and Ja'Nel that their teams will be creating dishes for two tables of celebrity diners.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: One contestant's overly speedy delivery arouses Gordon's suspicions. Will they be able to win back his respect during the first dinner service of the series?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: In the second show of the series, the men hope to redress the balance after last week's disastrous start as they take on a beach side challenge. Later, a ruined risotto could spell the end of the line for one unlucky hopeful.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Despite having three chefs ejected, it looks like the blue team's fortunes could be improving after another fraught dinner service. Will raw fish and overcooked meat spell the end for more than one hopeful from the red team?

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Contract to Kill / The Mornington Monster
programme.desc: Crime Investigation Australia has conducted a major investigation which reveals the inside story of the Megan Kalajzich murder and the extraordinary police investigation which will rock the Harbour City's elite to the core.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Buried Alive: Luckman and Reid

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: No Mercy: The Killing of Virginia Morse
programme.desc: The horrific story of killers Allan Baker and Kevin Crump who began their murderous spree in rural NSW by killing a complete stranger for $20, a packet of cigarettes and a couple of litres of petrol.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Kimberley Killer
programme.desc: Seven years after the disappearance of baby Azaria Chamberlain at Ayers rock, long before the murder of Peter Falconio on a remote stretch of highway in the Australian outback and two years before Ivan Milat begins his reign of backpacker murders.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Wanda Beach Murders / The Beaumont Children Mystery
programme.desc: In 1965, when Australian teenage culture was centred on sun, sand, and surf, the nation was shocked by the brutal bashing, rape and murder of two 15-year-old girls in the sand hills at Sydney's Wanda Beach.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Jack & Jill
programme.desc: Today's case is a twofer, a brother and sister both charged with drug related offenses. Also, Dog has crossed paths with the brother before. He once tried to stop Dog from arresting one of the most violent fugitives of his career.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Island Hopper
programme.desc: When a brother bondsman from Washington State calls Dog for help tracking a runner in search of fun in the sun on the tropical paradise of Kauai, the team gets on the case. Dog's only problem? No leads!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Nice Guys Finish Last

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Back Behind Bars

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Family Man

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: All in the Family
programme.desc: Dog and the team need to help Leland hunt down some elusive fugitives. The case is a family affair with both mother and daughter in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mother Courage
programme.desc: Dog knows that crime and drugs not only damage victims but also harm the families of the perpetrators, especially the kids. And both of the fugitives he's chasing today have left shattered families and struggling women in their wake.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bounty Boot Camp
programme.desc: Jim is a bondsman and longtime friend of Dog. Jim's son has just started in the family business. Today, Jim has asked Dog to track down a potentially dangerous fugitive, and take his son along for some training with the best in the world.

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big My Little Pony Episode
programme.desc: When Mona finds out the pony Charles gave Dee Dee when they were kids is still around (who she named 'Daddy's Favorite'), Mona's childhood feelings of sibling rivalry resurface.

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big Birth-Date Episode

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big Advice to Put It On Ice Episode
programme.desc: When sexual tension leads to conflict in the workplace between Spencer and Mona, Dee Dee and Adam encourage them to close the book on their romantic feelings for each other.

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big One Wedding And A Funeral Episode
programme.desc: Mona and Dee attend a wedding of one of Dee's ex-boyfriends Neil, while Phyllis and Big Dee attend the funeral of someone they were both once intimately involved with.

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big Don't Leave Me This Way Episode

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: THe Big No-So Loyal Family Episode

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big Don't Go Chasing Waterfalls Episode
programme.desc: To try to give his career a jumpstart, Spencer goes after signing a notorious bad-boy performer, but he has his hands full when the singer isn't as reformed as he led people to believe.

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big My Life And Kids Episode

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big Thanks For Nothing Episode
programme.desc: High drama occurs and secrets are revealed at Dee Dee's Thanksgiving party when Spencer's father, Ray, shows up unexpectedly. Mona comes clean to her father about her feelings of being slighted by him and Phyllis rethinks her relationship with Ray.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Don't You Want Me Baby?
programme.desc: When Toni revisits the past, it could destroy her future with Todd.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Wilshire and Butch
programme.desc: Wilshire, a hyperactive Dalmatian in Los Angeles, runs amuck in Firehouse 29 and the city attorney threatens to take him away if he doesn't shape up. Cesar tries to clear Wilshire's spotty past.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: A Dog and his Boy; Mobile Vet
programme.desc: Vet Dr. Rick Garcia, needs Cesar’s help with some high maintenance patients. An 11 month old Siberian Husky must learn how to be a member of the family.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Calvin, Rudy, and Milo

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Viper and Diesel

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Delta and Dong Dong
programme.desc: Delta, a dog with aggressive behavior and a fear of men. Dong-Dong, a rescue from Taiwan, who has found solace in the living room chair of his adopted home. He won’t get up for anything.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Psychiatrist
programme.desc: Alexis tricks Blake into coming to Rome and further traps him by hiring a gossip photographer to snap suggestive photos of the two; Jeff begs Fallon to cancel her abortion; as Nick confronts Krystle, his consolation gives way to passion.

programme.title: Dynasty: Sammy Jo and Steven Marry
programme.desc: Nick tells Krystle of his deep feelings for her; Steven and Sammy Jo marry; Fallon cancels her abortion; after the scandal caused by the papparazzi photos of Alexis and Blake, Krystle leaves her husband.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Car Explosion
programme.desc: Nick persuades Krystle to leave Blake; Steven and Sammy Jo announce they are married; Blake is attacked by gangsters and blinded when his car is bombed.

programme.title: Dynasty: Blake's Blindness
programme.desc: Blake remains blinded following the explosion; Nick asks Krystle to divorce her husband and marry him; Blake investigates Nick's past; Alexis is determined to drive Krystle from Denver.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Hearing
programme.desc: Fallon confesses her love to Nick, but he is interested in Krystle; Blake's attempts to bring gangster Logan Rhinewood before a Crime Committee hearing are thwarted; Sammy Jo tells Alexis she knows her secret; Blake receives an anonymous letter.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Iago Syndrome

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.8
programme.desc: Teenagers dispute damages after breakup: iPhone thrown, windshield damaged/Judge Judy illustrates loan with paper scraps as unwed mother sues child's father for startup loan.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.191
programme.desc: In a divorce battle, a woman loans $2,000 for legal fees. A karate school owner sues a motorist over a collision impacting business. Teens and moms dispute a traded Ford Mustang's value.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.197
programme.desc: Woman sues child's father for PlayStation III balance and harassment. 'Good Samaritan' sues former friend for student loan balance.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.58
programme.desc: Man and stepson suing ex-friend for iPod and necklace face weakened case due to internet slander. Woman demands ex-fiancé pay Home Depot card charges; he claims items used to fix her home.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.52
programme.desc: A woman sues her daughter’s schoolmate and her teen goddaughter for damages to her property and an ambulance bill, resulting from an assault.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.86
programme.desc: Botched deal to trade babysitting for rent leaves ex-roommates fighting over dumped clothes and unpaid bills. Woman accuses friend of kidnapping her kids during her jail time, refuses to repay dental loan.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.37
programme.desc: Parents allegedly renege on owed money for son's wedding after not being invited/Woman sues child's father for false domestic violence accusation upon discovering love note to wife in Tunisia.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.34
programme.desc: Mother falsely accused of child abuse by ex-husband, his mother, and roommate/Case dismissed after 17 abuse reports/Man sues great nephew for jeep damage; nephew claims fun spin caused crash.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.96
programme.desc: A woman is suing her husband’s ex-wife and teenage daughter for damaging her car when the teenager allegedly pounded it with her fist/A teenager is accused of horsing around and crashing a relative’s Oldsmobile Allero into a curb.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.95
programme.desc: An intoxicated teenager confesses to urinating in a friend’s yard; she sues her ex-friend for coming to her workplace and telling everyone about it.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.19
programme.desc: Man alleges ex-girlfriend ordered escort attack in bar; she denies and countersues for dirt bike balance, car vandalism, and harassment/Trashed hotel room after 18th birthday sparks damages lawsuit.

programme.title: 48 Hours: House of Secrets
programme.desc: In September 2006, Kathy Wangler, wife of anesthesiologist Dr. Mark Wangler, died from carbon monoxide poisoning in their home. Their 30-year marriage had been falling apart; In 2009, investigators concluded that Dr. Wangler had murdered his wife.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Killing Fields
programme.desc: A report about a desolate strip of land between Houston and Galveston where over 30 young women and girls have disappeared or have been murdered.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Time to Kill
programme.desc: 17-year-old Sterling Barber was accused of murdering Gerald Douglas Wyatt, a church deacon. The Carnesville, Georgia teenager claimed that he acted in self-defense because Wyatt, known to be a predator, was trying to molest him.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: One Last Hug
programme.desc: An updated report on growing dangers of dating and breakup violence, focusing on Melissa Dohme, who agreed to meet a former boyfriend, Robert Burton, for one last hug before they broke up forever. The decision nearly cost her her life.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: In 1986, 21-year-old Mitzi Nalley was brutally murdered in her Austin, Texas home. Police arrested Jonathan Wayne Nobles, who confessed to the crime and was sentenced to the death penalty.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Strange Truth
programme.desc: In March 2003, Ramona Krotine left an office party and was never seen alive again. 24 hours later, she was found in the trunk of her car, beaten and shot to death. At first, police suspected a botched robbery but later believed her husband was to blame.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Leona
programme.desc: Robert Goulet guest stars as Joe Epic, a syndicate crime leader and key figure in an IMF plan to free a captured undercover agent.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: TOD-5
programme.desc: To locate a terrorist ring called Alpha Group, the IMF convinces turncoat intelligence agent Gordon Holt (played by guest star Peter Haskell) that he's been exposed to the stolen biological weapon he's been hired to deliver.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Cocaine
programme.desc: William Shatner guest stars as Joe Conrad, a drug dealer who becomes the unwitting dupe of the Impossible Missions Force in their plan to capture the largest shipment of cocaine ever brought into the country.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Underground
programme.desc: Phelps poses as a murderer to infiltrate a gang that specializes in spiriting wanted men out of the country after first brainwashing them to learn the whereabouts of their vast sums of money.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Movie
programme.desc: Phelps poses as the head of a Hollywood movie studio as part of the IMF plan to prevent a crime syndicate's takeover of the studio.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Machine Gun Ton
programme.desc: Ton and Allen battle a pair of vicious female auction hunters who have an axe to grind and bid based on spite rather than strategy. And a gatling gun & suit of armor are worth much less than the guys expected.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Risk & Reward
programme.desc: Ton & Allen arrive late to an auction. They uncover vintage bear traps and a bounty of street art. If the pieces belong to the artist, RISK, it could be their biggest score ever. If not, they'll be stuck with forged knockoffs.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Space Cowboys
programme.desc: With the pawn shop history, Ton and Allen start the next chapter of their careers with a bang. They uncover an antique WWII firearm and a Russian cosmonaut space suit, which could be their biggest find to date...if it's real.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton Voyage
programme.desc: When a ruthless storeowner seems hell-bent on stopping Ton & Allen from scoring new items in Santa Barbara they fight back. The guys uncover a rare antique air-gun and a vintage wooden boat built for speed, if it floats!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Mr. Violence
programme.desc: 29yr old Chris is shot in cold blood outside a neighborhood bar. Faced with a trio of suspects, Kenda trusts his gut and makes a controversial decision.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: With Friends Like This
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down outside his home . Sgt. Joe Kenda and Det. John Anderson must determine whether the killer was a complete stranger, a barrio gang member, or a jealous lover.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Settle the Score
programme.desc: When Johnny Crawford is killed in his easy chair, police are perplexed to learn he may have been shot over a musical instrument. It soon becomes clear the young man wasn’t killed for his own sins.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In 2015 care worker Torrance Cheeves is found stabbed to death in his Texas home. With no suspects and a trail of puzzling evidence, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in the surrounding area for answers.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: When 12-year-old Alajawan Brown is gunned down outside a 7-Eleven in Skyway, Washington, close to an earlier shooting, the police refer to CCTV footage to help put together pieces of the puzzle and find the killer.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Sylvilla Humphrey shot her friend, Ercell Minix in the neck, at the beauty salon where she worked. The victim's son, 5 at the time, is now NBA star Kendrick Perkins.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Britney Gulley and Jeremisha Adams (both 19 at the time) are responsible for shootings and robberies that left two people dead and a third blind in both eyes.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: In 1986 the body of Patrice LaBlanc surfaces in a Texas Lake. She's been stabbed 39 times by her drag queen boyfriend Cliff Youens. Now he confesses to his crimes.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: An investigation into whether Loyd and Agnes Courtney were beaten and stabbed to death by their daughter Deborah. Prosecutors say it was for money, but Deborah says she didn't do it.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre: Murder Files
programme.desc: Donal MacIntyre interviews Detective Chief Inspector Martin Brunning to discover how the capture of killer Joanna Dennehy led to the discovery of a string of victims.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre: Murder Files
programme.desc: Donal MacIntyre interviews former Detective Chief Inspector Clive Driscoll to discover how he investigated the suspected murder of Surjit Athwal, without a body or witness.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Boardinghouse Killer
programme.desc: Dorothea Puente provided shelter for the infirm in her boardinghouse. It wasn't until a body was found in her yard that authorities realized she was not who she appeared to be.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The BTK Strangler
programme.desc: In 1974, a man identifying himself as the BTK (Bind, Torture, Kill) Strangler started a killing spree in Kansas spanning the next two decades.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Rockhampton Rapist
programme.desc: In the late 1990s, a string of disappearances in Rockhampton, Queensland left police searching for a killer they couldn't identify.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Girls Just Wanna Get Found
programme.desc: Cindy Zarzycki is 13 years old when she goes missing on her way to a Detroit ice cream store.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Douglas Robert Worth: The Pictou Sadist
programme.desc: On December 11, 1987 a hard luck child living in a group home in Ontario was reported missing when she failed to return home from school.

programme.title: Pointless: Episode 40

programme.desc: Richard speaks with several journalists and researchers who argue the theory that human use of carbon-based fossil fuels will lead to catastrophic global warming.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: JFK
programme.desc: Richard meets with some prominent JFK assassination researchers to discuss the November 1963 murder of President John F. Kennedy.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Pterodactyls
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several explorers and cryptozoologists who believe pterodactyls, flying dinosaurs thought to have become extinct some 60 million years ago, are alive and thriving in remote places such as Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: GMO - Genetically Modified Food
programme.desc: Richard investigates claims crop plants created for human or animal consumption using the latest molecular biology techniques are unsafe.

programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show investigates the safety and efficacy of putting fluoride in our water supply. Dentists say that putting fluoride in the water supply prevents tooth decay, but some researchers claim it's a toxic substance that causes cancer.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Area 51
programme.desc: What's going on inside Area 51, America's most carefully guarded secret? The mysterious military base located 30 minutes north west of Las Vegas has been rumored to be involved in back engineering advanced alien technology recovered from UFO crash sites.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Remote Viewing
programme.desc: We meet several individuals who claim they have the ability to transcend time and space and identify people, objects, and locations hidden from their view.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Freemasons
programme.desc: Are the Freemasons a harmless fraternity whose members busy themselves by raising money for children's hospitals or a satanic cult whose tentacles and enslave mankind?

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Smithsonian Institution, Washington DC

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Maritime Museum, London
programme.desc: From the musket shot that killed Admiral Nelson to an anti-piracy commando raid, discover the secrets inside the National Maritime Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside The ROM, Toronto

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: EARTHQUAKES
programme.desc: Earthquakes happen when tectonic plates suddenly slip causing shock waves to shake the surface of the Earth. They occur on fault lines - the most active are the Ring of Fire in the Pacific Ocean and the San Andreas fault on America’s west coast.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: HURRICANES
programme.desc: Hurricanes, Typhoons and Cyclones all the same thing with different names – what they also have in common is their destructive power! Hurricanes are large, swirling storms and winds from a hurricane can damage buildings or trees.

programme.title: Naked Science: Jupiter
programme.desc: By far the largest planet, 1300 times the size of Earth, it’s a world so enormous it could swallow every planet and moon in the solar system and still have room to spare.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Great Flood

programme.title: Naked Science: Saturn

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Destroy A Planet
programme.desc: The Earth is built to last. It is a 4,550,000,000-year-old, 5,973,600,000,000,000,000,000-tonne ball of rock and iron. It has taken more devastating asteroid hits in its lifetime than you've had hot dinners, and it still orbits happily around the sun.

programme.desc: Dog faces a tough personal and professional situation when he must hunt down his friend, Ili, who has helped him on many busts. But now Ili's on the other side of the law, and now Dog must bring her in.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Big Bags and Boxers
programme.desc: Dog is out to make two grabs on two islands in one day. Part of the team is goes to Kona to nab a woman who skipped her court date. Meanwhile, Dog and the others hunt Patrick, a fugitive who's fighting in an Extreme Boxing event on the Big Island.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Stumped on a way to celebrate Willie's birthday, Korie enlists the guys' help and Jase takes the reigns in planning a trip to the lake where Phil and Kay used to live. Meanwhile, the women realize a raccoon is inside the lake house.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Glory Is the Reward of Mallard
programme.desc: When Willie takes a business trip to Scotland to expand his duck call business, he brings the entire family along so they can reconnect with their Scottish roots. Willie organizes a bus tour to trace his family heritage.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Good Night and Good Duck
programme.desc: A special holiday episode of Duck Dynasty shows when the Robertson family took over the Thanksgiving special of a local TV show "Good Morning Arklamiss." Each family member presents a special holiday segment, with Willie and Jase serving as anchormen.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack in the Saddle
programme.desc: When Willie becomes the temporary owner of a thoroughbred, he and the guys take it to a local track and enter it into a race. Meanwhile, when Kay decides she wants to buy a new birdbath for her yard, she recruits Phil, Martin and Godwin.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: The Robertsons help a long time employee whose Mom has fallen on hard times by buying her a brand new house for Christmas. Jep, Jase, Martin and Godwin race to finish a deck in time for the big reveal, only to get sidetracked by a hammering competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Cannonball Runs
programme.desc: Jase enters an outhouse race to help promote Willie's Duck Diner, but when the Robertsons show up for the race, they face an unexpected rival - Phillip McMillan. Meanwhile, Willie attempts to create the world's greatest bologna sandwich.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Mo Math, Mo Problems
programme.desc: Willie helps Sadie with her homework by enlisting the guys to create a real-life version of a math problem, but when Jase and Willie get sidetracked helping Sadie, they rekindle an old argument of whether Jase can outrun a truck.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Coop! There It Is!
programme.desc: When Jep asks Willie and the guys to help move his old chicken coop into his new house, which is under renovation, Jessica takes issue with its appearance, leading the guys to yet another project - renovating the chicken coop.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Friday Afternoon Lights
programme.desc: When Willie becomes an assistant coach on Lil' Will's struggling football team, his authority is tested when the kids challenge the adults to a scrimmage. Meanwhile, Kay brings Jep and Si to an aquarobics class at a local health club.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Inner Limits
programme.desc: A young man decides to institutionalize his brother who has been completely paralyzed and speechless for many years, against the wishes of their mother.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: It's a Dog's Life
programme.desc: Mark believes that God has turned Jonathan into a dog. Meanwhile, he must contend with a runaway kid and the kid's scatterbrained mother.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Merry Christmas from Grandpa
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Jonathan shows three men what will happen in the future if the Earth continues to be ravaged by pollution. One of the men is an energy official another is a farmer and the third one is the President.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Pilot - Part 1
programme.desc: In the series opener, we meet Jonathan Smith, a probationary angel who has been sent to help people on Earth. He befriends residents at a retirement home. The administrator at the home has a brother named Mark who is suspicious of Jonathan.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Pilot - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan helps the residents of Havencrest, when they learn that the retirement home is going to be sold. Jonathan must reveal his real identity to Mark in order to complete the assignment.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Air to Air
programme.desc: Being on an aircraft that comes in close proximity to an object that doesn't appear on radar is a scary experience. Who are they and what do they want?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 12
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Alien Bodies: Uncover the shocking truth about alien remains as experts investigate unsettling reports of extraterrestrial bodies recovered from crashed UFOs.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 9
programme.desc: We have always been told that mankind enjoys free will. Is this really true or have aliens created the means for controlling humanity?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: UFO Zones: Journey to the world's hottest UFO zones, where physical and paranormal phenomenons and unidentified objects and aliens are reported with alarming frequency.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: In 1947, there was an unprecedented wave of UFO sightings that propelled the UFO phenomenon to the world stage. What were the US Air Force's findings?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Discover how international governments investigate UFO sightings and the secrecy in which they shroud their findings.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 6
programme.desc: Experts open previously off-limits files in a bid to answer some of the most mysterious questions surrounding UFOs and extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: War Story: Vengeance
programme.desc: In 1941, nearly 30,000 Jews escaped the ghettos and work camps and they joined the growing underground resistance army, actively fighting the Nazis.

programme.title: War Story: Prisoners of the Sun
programme.desc: On 16 November 1941, two Canadian battalions arrived in the British colony of Hong Kong. Their aim: Bolster the Empire’s defenses in the event of aggression by the restless forces of Japan, stationed only kilometres away in occupied China.

programme.title: War Story: The Last Ship: The Sinking of the Esquimalt
programme.desc: On 16 April 1945, a mere three weeks before German surrender, the submarine fired a single torpedo that sank the last Canadian naval vessel lost to enemy action.

programme.title: War Story: Buchenwald Airmen
programme.desc: For two months in 1944, 168 Allied airmen were shot down over occupied France, betrayed to the Gestapo by the same collaborator, transported to the Nazi concentration and slave labour camp Buchenwald.

programme.title: War Story
programme.desc: In the longest campaign of the Second World War, from 1939 to 1945, German submarines desperately try to sever Britain’s shipping lifeline across the Atlantic Ocean. Canada plays the central role in the campaign.

programme.title: War Story: Not One Step Back: The Battle of Stalingrad
programme.desc: In the summer of 1942, the Germans advance to seize the rich oilfields of the Caucasus. In their path, the city of Stalingrad, its Soviet defenders personally ordered by Stalin to “take not one step back".

programme.title: War Story: Behind Enemy Lines
programme.desc: Royal Canadian Air Force bombing operations play a crucial role in disrupting German infrastructure ahead of the Normandy invasion of June 1944. In the process, dozens of Canadian airmen are forced to bail out over occupied Belgium and France.

programme.title: War Story: Whistle for a Tiffy
programme.desc: From D-Day, Tactical Air Force fighter-bombers played a pivotal role in Allied battlefield success; Canadian soldiers knew they could always “whistle for a Tiffy”.

programme.title: War Story: Surviving Dieppe
programme.desc: The Dieppe assault of 19 August 1942 is the worst day in Canadian military history: in just 8 hours, 907 Canadians were killed. For 2,000 of their comrades, nearly three years of incarceration in German prison camps followed.

programme.title: War Story: D-Day plus 1
programme.desc: The Canadian stand against the 12th SS Panzer Division Hitlerjugend immediately after D-Day allowed the Allies to switch to the offensive and truly begin the liberation of Europe.

programme.title: War Story: Falaise, the corridor of death
programme.desc: The Canadian army played the pivotal role in closing the Falaise Gap and ensuring Allied victory in the Normandy Campaign in August 1944.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike & Kristen
programme.desc: Mike met Kristen on Facebook. They quickly forged a deep connection, but Mike's frequent efforts to meet Kristen have been futile. Will Mike finally get face-to-face with Kristen?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jeff & Megan
programme.desc: After a string of bad luck with women, Jeff believes he has finally found his dream girl Megan. However, Megan is starting to sound off Catfish alarms.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Joanna was about to meet her online love in the flesh, but a crazy night in Vegas caused the whole relationship to go sour. Now she's enlisted Nev to help track down her former flame. (S5, ep8)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tyler & Amanda
programme.desc: After a year and a half of chatting with her online, Tyler thinks he may have a future with Amanda. But are Tyler's friends correct because they suspect that something isn't right?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: For years, Nicole has had her pictures stolen to make fake profiles, one of which has been catfishing Ryan for ten years. Ryan and Nicole are unsure whether it's a random troll, or they have a common enemy.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Danny is intent on building a life with his online love, despite her violent past. But when he enlists Nev and Max to help him meet her, they discover she may have ties to a former Catfish! (S6, ep3)

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 214
programme.desc: Megan tells her best friend and roommate how much she likes him. Joey is ready for more than just friendship with Bebo.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 206
programme.desc: Timing is right for Spenser to reveal his feelings to his best friend Blanca. Nazzy is scared to reveal her crush on her best friend Joel.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 216
programme.desc: Justice has a second chance to ask out his friend Kayla. Andrew will finally confess his feelings to his best friend, Liz.

programme.title: The Hills: Back To New York / One Last Chance
programme.desc: Whitney travels to New York expecting to reconnect with Alex, but a new boy named Jay steals her away. Heidi is miserable after being fired, and Spencer is making matters worse. (S4, ep14)

programme.title: The Hills: You Did This / It's About Trust
programme.desc: Lauren is enraged to learn that Audrina believed speculation that she and Justin were involved with each other. Heidi struggles balancing her relationships with Holly and Spencer. (S4, ep16)

programme.title: The Hills: Dream Boy, Dream Job / Mr. & Mrs. Pratt
programme.desc: Whitney gets offered a chance at her dream job in New York. Lauren grows nostalgic when she learns her parents are selling their house in Laguna Beach. (S4, ep18)

programme.title: The Hills: I Heidi Take Thee Spencer / Don't Cry On Your Birthday
programme.desc: When Lauren and Heidi have a run-in, they put their feud aside and remember why they used to be friends. Justin shocks Audrina by whisking her away to Palm Springs! Last in the series. (S4, ep20)

programme.title: The City: Fashion With A Capital F
programme.desc: Olivia refuses to wear a designer's clothes to their own party, which angers some. Whitney shows Joe Zee her line & gets some harsh criticism. Erin eyes a replacement for Olivia. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: Chelsea's dad tries to cut Adam out of her life, Jenelle is arrested for breaking and entering, Kailyn signs a joint custody agreement and Leah and Corey tie the knot. Last in the series.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Finale Special: Check Up With Dr. Drew
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts the cast of Teen Mom 2 on-stage in front of a live studio audience. Jenelle, Chelsea, Kailyn and Leah reflect on the struggles of their first year of motherhood.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 1 Unseen Moment
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts a look at the humour and the heartbreaking moments never before seen with Kailyn, Leah, Jenelle and Chelsea from the first season of Teen Mom 2.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: Jenelle is back with Kieffer after bailing him out of jail, but everything hits the fan when Barbara finds out that she's been lying about Kieffer and kicks her out.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Curveball
programme.desc: Leah's upset when Ali needs another MRI. Jenelle and Kieffer are living in her car but begin to fight. Chelsea decides to give Adam another shot.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Intensive care
programme.desc: Kailyn finds an apartment through a non-profit organization and moves out without telling her mum. After a huge fight where Kieffer pushed her, Jenelle decides to file domestic charges.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: The Lost Continent (Atlantis)
programme.desc: As the Nazis rose to power, Himmler and the SS were convinced Atlantis could be found, and instigated a series of archeological expeditions seeking uncover and exploit its secrets.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Walking with Witches
programme.desc: Convinced the medieval witch trials were a Judeo-Christian attempt to exterminate the Aryans, Himmler established a special team led by Reinhard Heydrich to build a database of medieval German witchcraft practices.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: The Quest for the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Revealing the work of a secret team of scientists and scholars established by SS leader Heinrich Himmler to scour the globe seeking the origins of the Aryan race and collect ancient artifacts.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Into the Mountains (Tibet)
programme.desc: Revealing the work of a secret team of scientists and scholars established by SS leader Heinrich Himmler to scour the globe seeking the origins of the Aryan race and collect ancient artifacts.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Cro Magnon
programme.desc: The debate about humanity's true origins becomes a nefarious fixation as SS leader Heinrich Himmler turns his attention to proving the Paleolithic past of Germany's Aryan race.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mutiny at Sea
programme.desc: A mixture of bad luck and mutiny brews in this tumultuous episode of Wicked Tuna. Tensions erupt on New England's top tuna boat, Tuna.Com, when Captain Dave and Paul get into a heated confrontation that causes Paul to quit!

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Grudge Match
programme.desc: With just two weeks left until the end of tuna fishing season, Bounty Hunter gains a new deckhand.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Captain Ralph in Not
programme.desc: A hard season with little money to show has taken its toll on the crew of the Odysea, leading Captain Ralph to lash out at his first mate Pirate.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Good to the Last Bite
programme.desc: As the final week of tuna fishing begins, the Hard Merchandise, the Bounty Hunter, the Tuna.Com and the Odysea steam out together, each captain vowing to catch the biggest tuna before the season ends.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Back In The Hunt
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, head for open seas in hopes of catching the first fish of the Atlantic Bluefin Tuna Season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Go Fish!
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, battle for the elusive and lucrative giant Bluefin tuna, with harpooners going up against rod-and-reelers.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Recap
programme.desc: This week, we sit down with Bryan Golie, Jeff Darrah, Joe Kambic, and John Lasofsky as they recount what they've been through in their careers as well as what happened this past season.

programme.title: Wardens: Antler Raiders
programme.desc: This week, Montana game wardens try to control the masses as the gates open and antler hunters are set free to find their trophies.

programme.title: Wardens: Across The Seeded Fields
programme.desc: Montana game wardens work the opening day of pronghorn season as they monitor legal and illegal hunting practices, as well as protecting the seeded fields from undue harm.

programme.title: Wardens: Guts
programme.desc: This week, Montana game wardens deal with the opening day of deer season and all the trouble that goes along with it.

programme.title: Wardens: In The Drink
programme.desc: This week, Montana game wardens deal with some of the many water issues they deal with including littering, under- age drinking, and the annual Yellowstone Boat Float.

programme.title: Wardens: Warrants & Weed
programme.desc: This week, game wardens deal with repeat offenders and people with outstanding warrants that only make matters worse when confronted.

programme.title: Wardens: Cheeseheads
programme.desc: This week, game wardens are looking for poachers and those not hunting within the law, all with a little help from full size decoys and local citizens calling in to the TIP-MONT hotline.

programme.title: Wardens: Three-Fifty-Seven
programme.desc: This week, game wardens try and track down a potential poacher who took a deer out of season. Then, we'll follow another warden as he takes his son hunting when his son draws a hard to come by moose tag.

programme.title: Wardens: Mercy Kill
programme.desc: Warden Kambic investigates a wounded elk and the hunter who tried to do the right thing.

programme.title: Wardens: Tangled
programme.desc: A wounded deer has locked horns with another buck creating a dilemma for Warden Burroughs.

programme.title: Wardens: 18 Minutes
programme.desc: On this episode, the Wardens investigate a possible elk harassment case, and a possible poaching in Montana.

programme.title: The Hidden Hand Alien Contact and the Government Cover Up
programme.desc: The Hidden Hand is a controversial EBE Award winning documentary that explores the possibility of an extraterrestrial presence here on Earth.

programme.title: Dulce Base: The New Illuminati
programme.desc: Dulce, New Mexico is a hotspot for mysterious phenomena and alleged secret military collaboration between humans and aliens.

programme.title: 27 Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Strange and bizarre UFO encounters abound, but recent Alien encounters by highly credible eyewitnesses are so unusual and perplexing that they challenge our understanding of physics and the Universe as we know it.

programme.title: Abducted by Aliens: UFO Encounters of the 4th Kind
programme.desc: Are we being taken by beings from outer space or another dimension? A troubling phenomenon has been occurring for centuries.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 6
programme.desc: Sketch hides a Kardashian catastrophe, Alice gives Lana's emoji a facelift, and Jay is moved by a family's story of bravery.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 3
programme.desc: The Fixers are putting bad tatts to bed in the sunny Med. Jay is taking on Tom the Titty Whacker, Alice helps out Catherine a Cher impersonator with a awful orchid and Sketch destroys a Alex's bad boxing tat.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 1
programme.desc: The Tattoo Fixers are back, and this time they've headed to the scene of the crime to cover awful art...the summer holiday! Ian needs help to cover his Magaluf monstrosity and Jay gives Callum a portrait to remember.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 5
programme.desc: The Tattoo fixers take on Mother-loving Ryan, Carly's puckered up revenge tat and Scots silly holiday slogan. Meanwhile Girls on tour Sam & Ellie, Paralympian Jess and Tattoo fanatic Liam all head to the parlour for some ink action.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 8
programme.desc: Sketch takes on Bex whose stinker of a tat has left her feeling unloved, Alice helps Nikki with a tat that has mistakenly mugged off her husband and Glen creates an elegant design for Emma who has overcome a brave battle with Anorexia.

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron gets called out at an MMA fight. Marnie is finally ready to have visitors and Holly and Jacob throw an epic engagement party. (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron takes up golf with hilarious results. Sophie makes a life changing purchase. Holly has a fitness photo shoot and Marnie & Casey have their first date since Rox's birth. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Holly prepares to meet one of her trolls. Gary and Emma's second baby arrives early. Sophie shows off her new house and Marnie & Casey fall out at the pool. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron welcomes his son into the world, but there's some bad news for his relationship. Holly takes a trip to secure a wedding venue and Marnie sees her mum for the first time since lockdown. (S3, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: After leaving Geordie Shore; Aaron, Marnie and Holly continue their journey through adult life. No more shots & kebabs, it's all about wedding planning, changing nappies and being grown ups. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: A hospital visit thaws tensions between Aaron and Talia. Holly goes shopping for bridesmaid dresses and Casey hatches a plan behind Marnie's back. (S3, ep3)

programme.desc: While the captain's daughter falls for Gopher, a book publisher flips a page in the book of love when trying to sign a burly author who happens to be accompanied by his attractive niece. Plus, an unusual couple looks for treasure.

programme.desc: Crew members become matchmakers when a man offers a handsome reward to anyone who can find him a good woman. Plus, a teen girl traveling with her mother faces potential humiliation when she runs into a former boyfriend.

programme.desc: A doctor and his lawyer girlfriend find their relationship on trial when he meets an old friend. Meanwhile, Gopher flips for his former schoolteacher, and a young man tries to impress his father when he meets two women.

programme.title: Arthur: Desert Island Dish/The Secret About Secrets
programme.desc: When Mr. Ratburn challenges the class to find the perfect food for surviving on a desert island, everyone picks potato chips or ice cream! D.W. is told a secret and quickly learns that keeping one is a lot harder than she thought.

programme.title: Arthur: Silent Treatment/Kung Fool
programme.desc: When shy George wonders if any of his friends notice him, he decides he won’t speak to anyone until they do! Fern volunteers to help an elderly neighbor with his household chores, and then discovers his past life as a Kung Fu celebrity.

programme.title: Arthur: Elwood City Turns 100!
programme.desc: Arthur and his friends commemorate their 100th episode in style! Mr. Ratburn's class is chosen to stage a musical tribute to Elwood City for its centennial celebration, which quickly becomes a drama behind the curtain!

programme.title: Arthur: The Case of the Girl with the Long Face/The Substitute Arthur
programme.desc: Fern's been feeling low and no one can figure out why. Luckily, Buster Baxter is on the case! With Arthur out of town, Buster is on the hunt for a new best friend, but he only wants to play games HIS way. Will Buster learn to compromise?

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. on Ice/Spoiled Rotten!
programme.desc: D.W. tells her friends that she's a fantastic skater, but she can barely stand on ice! With a skating party coming up, how will she face everyone and tell them the truth? Accused of being spoiled, Muffy sets out to prove her friends wrong.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Read: Super Saver!/Tibbles to the Rescue!
programme.desc: Business is slow for Mr. and Mrs. Read, and Arthur is concerned. Can he find ways to keep his family in the green? When D.W. saves Tommy and Timmy from a nasty fall, they decide to repay the favor…whether D.W. likes it or not.

programme.title: Arthur: The Wheel Deal/The Buster Report
programme.desc: After an injury, Brain has to spend some time using a wheelchair. Will he be able to compete in a basketball tournament for charity? The kids are assigned to write a report on someone they admire, and George picks….Buster!

programme.title: Arthur: Pets and Pests/Go Fly a Kite
programme.desc: There's a mouse loose in the Read home! And D.W. wants it gone…NOW! When traps fail, Arthur enlists the help of an expert mouse catcher. While playing in the park, Binky, Muffy, and Ladonna stumble upon an abandoned kite.

programme.title: Arthur: The Last Day (Part 1 & 2)
programme.desc: It's a time of change at Lakewood Elementary as Arthur and Buster move up to 4th grade. D.W. and Bud prepare to enter kindergarten and Muffy and Francine contemplate how spending the summer away from each other will affect their friendship.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Look What I Can Do
programme.desc: Barney's friends are playing a fun game of "I Can Do" where they each share something they can do. When BJ suggests having an "I Can Do" show, Baby Bop becomes worried.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Showtime!
programme.desc: Barney, BJ and the kids spend the day preparing for a performance for their friends in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Big Little Day

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Hot! It's Cold!
programme.desc: Throughout the day, Barney and the children learn about "hot" and "cold," but the fun really begins when Barney turns the playground into a winter/summer wonderland!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Riff find a pirate map, but in order to find the treasure, they have to be able to count. It’s time for a music concert in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A New Friend
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: As he watches birds fly overhead, Riff begins to daydream of flying himself. After seeing all the Moms playing with their kids in the Park, Baby Bop wonders what makes somebody a Mommy.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Once Upon a Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Mario is trying to write his very own fairy tale. The children help by acting out some of their favorite fairy tales to give Mario some ideas.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Splish! Splash!

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Human Error, Part 1

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Human Error, Part 2

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and his friends catch a bottle containing a map. Pingu and his sister take the record player outside. A classmate throws a paper airplane, and Pingu gets the blame.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu's friend, Pingo, teases him. Pingu is supposed to be looking after his neighbour's egg. Pingo has a brand-new toy car. Pingu plays Superman with his friend, Pingo.

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is put out when he loses several games of hide-and-seek. Pingu refuses to help Mother. Pingu asks Father if they can go up the mountain. Pingu goes fishing but promises to be back on time.

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu's friend plays with a kite outside the house. Pingu discovers a magnet. Pingu plays with his boat on the water. Pingu plays with his toys when he falls asleep.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu wants to play a thoughtless trick on Grandfather. Pingu and his sister play with their aeroplane. Pingu constantly plays tricks on his sister. Pingu sees a magic kit in the shop.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu wants to bake a cake by himself. The arm falls off Pingu's sister's teddy bear. The Pingu family receives a call from Grandfather asking for their help.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is delighted when he receives a Valentine card. Pingu tries to sleep, but his sister is snoring. Pingu bounces on everything in the igloo. The siblings argue over their toys.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a message that makes Laa-Laa laugh. The Teletubbies watch some children learning about the number one. The Teletubbies take turns to wear the skirt.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two children making music using saucepans. Tinky Winky hears a noise coming from inside the house. He goes inside to find Po making Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies crawl through the arch in Home Hill and watch Alex Pascall and some children sing 'Handy Hands'. A pair of mittens appear in Teletubbyland and Tinky Winky does a special dance wearing them.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies sit down for Tubby Toast. After they’ve eaten some more toast lands on their plates. They eat that, and some more toast lands again.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children wearing their boots and playing in the garden. A pair of boots appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang leave to convert a house into two separate flats. Mr Bentley, meanwhile, has been left in charge of The Mayor’s dog.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Fothergill has a nasty case of dry rot, so Bob and crew will have to use some smelly chemicals to fix it. As these will affect Mr Fothergill’s allergies, he goes to his sister’s for the day. But she doesn’t get on with Hamish, his pet parrot.

programme.title: Mega Machines: The Movie

programme.title: Race to the Finish

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scrambler is desperate to help Bob build a drying barn for Farmer Pickles sunflower farm. Scruffty is also excited about the building job and runs and jumps about getting in everyone’s way.

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Homes and Playgrounds
programme.desc: Join Bob and his “Can-Do” crew as they go back on site to show you the exciting real world of big machines! From bird’s nests to houses, we all need a home and in this brand new adventure Bob explains how they are built.

programme.desc: The 'Are You Haunted' team head northwest in this episode, and to a venue that counts reports of a mysterious black shape, and phantom screams as just two of the many incidents reported there. What will the team encounter?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Who's that?"
programme.desc: The team head to the East Midlands, to another overnight paranormal investigation. With reports of objects moving on their own, a cursed voodoo doll, and unexplained figures seen, will the team be able to shed any light on these mysterious incidents?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Is that you?"
programme.desc: This episode sees the 'Are You Haunted..?' team travel to the East Riding of Yorkshire area, where a venue steeped in history awaits investigation. Will the team encounter any sort of strange activity during their night here?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken Out
programme.desc: Was Donovan Reidy deliberately run down and left to die? In 1995, 23-year-old Donovan Reidy was at a party when he got into a fight. A short while later, his bloodied body was found on the side of a major New Zealand highway.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: 19-year-old Joan Wech left New Zealand for the bright lights of Sydney. But the first step on her overseas adventure would be her last. Was this a robbery gone wrong, a savage random attack or a revenge killing by a jealous ex-lover?

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of murdered Christchurch scrap-metal dealer, John Reynolds, to discover his killer and reveal the truth surrounding the violent attack.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: TAPS Meets the Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: The Ghost Hunters enlist the help of Bravo's The Real Housewives of Atlanta as they embark on this week's investigation.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghosts of Christmas Past
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS gets intothe Christmas spirit at New Hampshire's Christmas Farm Inn.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunted Town
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS investigates the entire town of Alexandria, Louisiana, where paranormal activity seems to lurk around every corner.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Pennsylvania Asylum
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Chester County, Pennsylvania to investigate the Pennhurst Asylum.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Century of Haunting
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Oxford, Massachusetts to help a family in need. The house has been in the Voas family for two generations, and lots of activity has been reported, from apparitions to shadow figures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Glove
programme.desc: When a terrifying haunting threatens to break a Daisytown, PA couple apart, PRS is their last resort. As the investigation deepens, PRS and the family learn that it's just the tip of iceberg, turns out this haunting might be all in the family.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Church of the Damned
programme.desc: Jason and his family can no longer do renovations of an abandoned Kansas church, especially after they found their father in the basement crying and frightened because of the menacing activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Who Is the Lurking Man?
programme.desc: PRS travels to Newcastle, CA to investigate a house with paranormal forces so strong, the family has cleared out. Ryan believes the Native American land may hold the key to the mystery and leads the team in a fight to reclaim a scared family's house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vendetta
programme.desc: P.R.S. investigates claims of supernatural revenge in the Pennsylvania Poconos. When a client's new boyfriend moves in, does the paranormal move in with him? Or did her ex put a hex on her house and the entire family?

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Messenger
programme.desc: Kelli and her husband Riley are frightened in their coastal Oregon home. They are plagued by a headless apparition and often hear mysterious noises that resemble cries for help from the dark corners of their house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name
programme.desc: Ryan Buell and company set out on one of their most dangerous cases to date - to help a single mother who is experiencing paranormal activity in a home that was once the site of brutal murder.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room & Board
programme.desc: The owners of a vacation lodge in the remote town of North Hudson, NY, feel their woodsy getaway is plagued by negative spirits.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Requiem
programme.desc: A young woman named Kristy has been haunted in her own bedroom since she can remember. Now it's up to Ryan and the crew to help Kristy before she's overwhelmed by the entity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Family Ties
programme.desc: Jimmie is haunted by the apparition of a mysterious old woman who peers at him in the bathroom of his family's Petersburg, VA home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Smoke and Shadows
programme.desc: Sarah believes her Parkville, MD home has been invaded by a powerful force ever since her roommate Dennis moved in. PRS investigates claims that Dennis has been attacked by the entity, a possible poltergeist.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Haden Hill House Part 2
programme.desc: The strange occurrences at Hayden Hill House switch up a gear as whatever is there seems now to be stalking the team with some terrifying results, at least for some of the crew it is proving too much.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Old House
programme.desc: This week Yvette Fielding takes her Most Haunted team to Coalville and a house that is surrounded by mystery. The team seem to disturb the rest of some of its long-term residence as they battle through a night of terror.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Keithley Bus Museum
programme.desc: Once an old foundry, this large old building houses vehicles from a bygone era that are said to still contain passengers whose destination has never ended.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Judges Lodgings Part 1
programme.desc: Yvette heads to Presteigne, Mid Wales and the famous Judges Lodgings, were courts were held, people imprisoned and Judges stayed, but it also holds many a secret.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Judges Lodgings Part 2
programme.desc: Most Haunted continues its investigation into the Judges Lodgings where the team seem to be under attack and something is trying to get through a door…but what?

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghosts Of War
programme.desc: When Dennis Pongratz finds his deceased father's Army belongings, he unlocks a treasure trove of WWII memorabilia, including an armband removed from a Nazi soldier killed in battle. Soon the Pongratz home becomes a battleground between good and evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: Death's Door
programme.desc: Victoria Dane was accidently overdosed before an emergency surgery and flat-lined for more than seven minutes. While recovering, she starts to notice unusual occurrences. She fears that she’s opened a door to a paranormal world that can never be shut.

programme.title: A Haunting: Fear Feeders
programme.desc: Soon after Al Gonzalez purchases a home outside Fort Wayne, Indiana, he begins to hear strange noises and sees unexplainable shadows. Paranormal investigators determine the entities in Al's home are dangerous and that he is not their first victim.

programme.title: A Haunting: Devil Inside Me
programme.desc: When John Drenner, Jr. finds a satanic bible, he unwittingly unleashes a sinister demon. The entity threatens John with violent physical attacks. Minister Bill Bean must act swiftly to perform a powerful exorcism and oust the demon before it’s too late.

programme.title: A Haunting: Echoes of the Past
programme.desc: The Johnson’s young daughter reveals that two fairies visit her room each night.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha and Dasha try to figure out who exactly is the best cook in all of the forest. As usual, Bear will have to be the one to solve the girls' dispute.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Bear prepares a gift for the Lady Bear and, as usual, dreams of winning his lady's heart. But unfortunately, Masha is also there, and there is no telling what her interference will lead to.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: It's another New Year for Masha and the rest of the gang. Masha has a lot of experience in organising unforgettable celebrations, so she takes matters into her own hands this time around.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha saves Bear from a fire and a grateful Bear makes her a gift: a toy fire truck.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Bear has a problem: his garden has been overtaken by dandelions. As Bear tries to fight against the weeds, Masha doesn't understand why he is throwing them away. After all, dandelions can be beautiful!

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha is the best mommy in the world, but even she cannot put Rosy to sleep. Bear offers a solution: providing a music box. However, the music box turns out to hold a surprise inside.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: A van with monkeys arrives at the Bear's house. They invite everyone to test themselves with the help of an attraction: a power meter. The Bear is confident that he will easily win the main prize.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: She-Bear is going on holiday and leaves Bear with her pet: a flycatcher. The modest flower shows an excellent appetite. Masha, of course, knows better than anyone how to treat the flycatcher.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Somebody terribly scary has climbed into the house of Penguin and made a terrible mess there. Bear rushes straight down to Antarctica to help, and, of course, Masha tags along with him.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The gang have a snow tower and a group of friends and it sounds like a recipe for a fun game. Even Bear caved to the pressure and joined Masha, Rosie, and Penguin as they figure out who will be the princess.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Spring has dawned and the birds have arrived, but a pigeon settles in the birdhouse near Bear's house. Masha is obviously more than happy to look after him, making him her new pet.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Bear has made a new purchase: he has bought a brand new motorcycle. Now, as a cool biker, he plans on impressing She-Bear, but she does not seem to like him or his motorcycle very much.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: On a nice summer's day Bear, as usual, goes fishing and Masha follows alongside. But the fishing trip didn't quite work out: the forest dwellers made a beach at Bear's favourite spot. Masha is glad to have the opportunity to swim.
