programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Hello? I am here!"
programme.desc: EXCLUSIVE. Sara, Phil, and the rest of the Are You Haunted team travel to North Yorkshire, to investigate a venue for the very first time. Among the incidents here are reports of male and female apparitions, doors opening and closing, and much more.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Jason Williams
programme.desc: Jason Williams goes out to meet friends for a night of drinking. He never returns. His family is frantic, it’s uncharacteristic of him to be out of touch.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Amie Hoffman
programme.desc: Teenager Amie Hoffman disappears after work one night. Police are on the case but when a family friend calls psychic Nancy Weber, she sees Amie’s murder in a bizarre vision.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Margie Calciano
programme.desc: Detective Robert Wanner consults psychic Lauren Thibodeau to help with a case that has left him stumped. Surprisingly she instead offers clues on a cold case that’s been worrying Wanner for years.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Rachel Domas
programme.desc: Can a veteran psychic and a rookie cop crack a case of a missing fourteen-year-old girl? Rachel Domas misses her school bus and walks the 3 miles home. She’s never seen again.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Alexis Burke
programme.desc: The police receive a call from John Burke, his twenty-one year old wife Alexis has been missing for three days. She took off in the family car after a fight and hasn’t been seen since.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Penney Serra
programme.desc: Twenty-one year old Penney Serra was brutally murdered in a parking garage. The police thought it was an open and shut case – witnesses had seen a suspect flee.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Lynsey Quy
programme.desc: Lynsey Quy a young mother and wife mysteriously vanishes on Christmas day, her husband reports her missing, the police start their search.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Mick Hughes
programme.desc: Landlord and pub owner Mick Hughes is brutally attacked in his living quarters situated above his bar, he bleeds to death. Discovered by employees 48 hours later, the police start gathering evidence.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Darryl Cozart
programme.desc: Family man Darryl Cozart disappears one night after work. His wife is frantic she knows something is wrong. The police believe it’s a missing persons case.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: In Too Deep
programme.desc: In 1999, Kiwi engineer Aaron Hopa and his English colleague Robert Glazzard were murdered on board a survey ship in the Persian Gulf in.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Fallen Angel
programme.desc: In this episode of Sensing Murder we learn about the murder of Angela Blackmoore, a 21 year old woman with a 2 year old child. The child was not harmed and the killer has not been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: A Mother's Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: Otautau toddler Amber-Lee, aged two and a half, vanished from Kingston at the southern tip of Lake Wakatipu on October 17, 1992.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Sensing Murder Insights - Special
programme.desc: Police detectives from around New Zealand reveal exciting new developments sparked by the Sensing Murder psychics in Series 1.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Now You See Me
programme.desc: 26-year-old deaf woman Alexa Cullen vanished from her home in Manaia, on the Coromandel Peninsular in 1995. She had a history of hitch-hiking and police suspected she’d run away. But three years later, ominous rumors began circulating in the community.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: The TAPS' team is called out to Newport, RI to hold the first ever-paranormal investigation at Seaview Terrace; best recognized from the TV show Dark Shadows.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghostly Evidence
programme.desc: A mother's suicide tortures four generations of one family.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghost of Carnegie
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to the Carnegie Library of Homestead, in Pennsylvania to investigate a site that once held violent riots between legendary capitalist, Mr. Carnegie and the steel workers. It is believed that Mr.Carnegie still haunts the library.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Harvesting Murder
programme.desc: A sugar plantation worker tied his daughter to a bed and went to work. Unable to escape, she died in a fire. Claims from the staff of Hawaii's Plantation Village in Waipahu.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Well of Horror
programme.desc: TAPS is joined by Jason's daughter, Haily, on two cases; The Shanley Hotel in Napanoch, New York and Old Fort Niagara, in Youngstown, New York. Both cases involve a gruesome death that took place at a well, instigating paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Sixth Sense
programme.desc: A worried mother calls the Paranormal Research Society to help her son Matthew, a boy who sees dead people. Matthew's story strikes a chord with team leader Ryan Buell who also experienced paranormal activity as a child.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Haunted Piano
programme.desc: Ryan and the PRS team are called in when unlucky antique collectors unwittingly bring a paranormally-infested piano into their home. The team attempts to dismantle and destroy the offending instrument.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Desperate Households
programme.desc: When Julie and her family moved into their dream home in suburban New Jersey they quickly realized they were not alone.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lost Souls
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/medium Michelle Belanger investigate a Pennsylvania home; where a mother named Kathy and her son Michael have both felt the presence of a young boy and hear voices calling, "Mom?" but no one is there.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Satan's Soldier
programme.desc: Mark and Kim can't sleep through the racket caused by unseen forces in their central Indiana home. When PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger discover what appears to be blood in the basement, they investigate a history of violence in the home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil's Hostage
programme.desc: When a woman has long scratch marks mysteriously appear on her back, PRS is called in to see if they are truly facing the devil. But her credibility is called into question, a struggle of another kind emerges for Ryan and the rest of the team.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Return of the Dead: Glove II
programme.desc: PRS returns to the site of one of their most famous cases, Daisytown, PA, where they had discovered a glove print of an old miner that they determined was the spirit of a Great-Grandfather.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Man of the House
programme.desc: PRS is called to help a grandmother and her frightened grandson when renovations on her 19th century house stir up the pipe-smoking specter of a former tenant named Alfred.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Beaumanor Hall Part 1
programme.desc: This time Yvette and her team ventures into the dark abyss of the cellars under this large country house. Without exception every member of the team experience something unexplained as the darkness starts to come to life

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Moat House Part 1
programme.desc: This time Yvette and her team ventures into the dark abyss of the cellars under this large country house. Without exception every member of the team experience something unexplained as the darkness starts to come to life.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Moat House Part 2
programme.desc: Yvette heads to Tamworth and a beautiful manor house that is said to be filled with paranormal occurrences. Almost as soon as the team get there something seems to want to make itself known with dramatic effect

programme.title: Ashwell Prison As Live Pt 1
programme.desc: The Most Haunted tackle the deserted sprawling Ashwell Prison in this As-Live uncut episode. Feeling isolated and separated the team find themselves confronted by something in the dark.

programme.title: Ashwell Prison As Live Pt 2
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team continue to film at Ashwell Prison after being pushed to the limits tempers fray and Yvette is stuck alone, petrified as she is stalked by an unseen force lost in the corridors of the prison and the team scramble to save her

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Devil's Tattoo, Static Man, The Bloody Hand, Where Have All the Heroes Gone, War Surplus.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Caitlin's Candle, The Flower Jury, The Mentor, The Old Bike, The Music Teacher.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Second Sight, The Fine Line, The Wrong Turn, Who Was I, You Are Next.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: E-Mail, Blood Donor, Epitaph, Stiches in Time, Soldier.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Wall, The Chalkboard, The Getaway, The Prescription, Summer Camp.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters: Living In A Haunted House
programme.desc: Witness what a terrifying experience it can be to live in a haunted house.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters: Ghosts Of The Murdered
programme.desc: See the disturbing and macabre ghosts of murder victims.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters: Phantoms Of The Phillipines
programme.desc: Watch Filipino ghosts haunt local residents and those who’ve moved abroad.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters: Graves Undug And Graves Disturbed
programme.desc: Visit a neighbourhood plagued by poltergeists when a burial ground is disturbed.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters: Ghosts In The Workplace
programme.desc: Meet people who have spiritual encounters at work, like a young burlesque dancer.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters: A Mother's Undying Love

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters: The Ghosts Of Trauma
programme.desc: Meet ghosts who died from traumatic circumstances, including a famous disaster.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters: A Family Torn Apart By A Haunted House

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters: The Price of Disbelief
programme.desc: See how people’s supernatural experiences have haunted them for life.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters: When Folk Tales Come True
programme.desc: Meet two people who have strange encounters reminiscent of popular folk tales.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Inferno
programme.desc: Kim and Craig move into their dream home in rural Bagley, Iowa with Kim’s two young daughters. When an unseen entity attacks the family, Kim and Craig realize they could be dealing with a ghost. They turn to a demonologist to help them reclaim the house.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Unleashed
programme.desc: Soon after Randy recites an incantation from a book on witchcraft, a growling monster appears.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ashes To Evil
programme.desc: Soon after moving in a large apartment in Hampton, Tennessee, Amelia’s family can’t shake the feeling that they are not alone. An evil entity lurks in their dream home and is targeting family members. They turn to paranormal investigators for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: Gateway To Evil
programme.desc: Devastated by a friend’s murder, Julisa holds a séance to communicate one last time--and unwittingly invites a dark spirit into her home…and her life. Julisa and her mother believe that she has re-ignited the evil that plagued her mother years ago.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Dark Side
programme.desc: The Wilcott’s 5-year-old son is attacked by an unseen entity. Their only hope is an exorcism.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon Unearthed
programme.desc: In the small town of Garden Grove, Iowa, Jennifer and Norman Rice with their son Andrew, purchase a majestic 19th century mansion. Soon after, Jennifer and Andrew begin experiencing paranormal activity while Norman is out of town on business.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: An inventor buys a clock from Molang and Piu Piu to make the heart of his robot. When the robot comes to life, the inventor is overjoyed. However, there is one small detail, the robot only likes Piu Piu.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Molang and Piu Piu are working on a ranch. But one of their friends Zero is particularly clumsy with his lasso and is rejected by the others. Molang and Piu Piu don't hesitate to come to his aid.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: When villagers see some Vikings landing from afar, general panic sets in. Molang and Piu Piu armed with courage, but also with brushes and shampoo are about to transform the faces of their invaders.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Molang and Piu Piu have decided to build a house in the middle of a beautiful clearing. However, they are not aware of the fact that a grumpy troll lives there too.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: When Pharaoh learns that Julius Caesar is coming to visit him in person, he wants to impress him.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Hercules is a hero who is adored for all his exploits. But in every day life, his strength is not always so helpful. It's up to Molang and Piu Piu to teach him how to be more careful.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, Molang and Piu Piu can be counted on to entertain the king, even when he's sad. Fortunately, these two friends know exactly what to do to cheer anyone one up, including the king.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: In prehistory, Molang and Piu Piu meet an alien who has come to observe them, but the most evolved one isn't the one anyone think.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Molang and Piu Piu meet a baby mammoth in the savana. They adopt it and name it Loulou. But their tribe isn't too keen on keeping Loulou around.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: In the Roaring Twenties, Piu Piu invents a new type of music. Molang wants his friend to meet a music producer, but the producer's bodyguard doesn't see it that way.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Molang and Piu Piu are Merlin's assistants. The magician is very renowned, but years have passed, and his powers aren't what they used to be.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: All the friends are working hard in the fields to make provisions for winter. But one of them stops and starts playing music. The fable of the Cricket and the Ant revisited.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: In Prehistory, the tribe's cook insists no papaya means no meal. Molang and Piu Piu set off to get the fruit but must play a game of rugby against a team of dodos to earn the last papaya.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: A ghost prepares a ball for the ghosts in the oldest tower of the king's castle. He decides to invite Molang and Piu Piu to his party because he lacks musicians. However, he forgets that he scares everyone.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Molang and Piu Piu meet a tribe of friends who solve everything with their clubs. Both will have to show the tribe there are other ways to solve their issues.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Molang, Piu Piu and some friends are working on a building site, but the work is exhausting for small Piu Piu. An engineer offers him robotic armour that gives him the strength to work faster.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: As Molang and Piu Piu are preparing a potion to cure the king's mosquito bites, they discover an adorable plant that's also a carnivore.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: After a coconut fight, Molang and Piu Piu are stranded on two different islands. To be reunited, they will have to reconcile two fighting people and show them what coconuts are really for.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Into Thin Air
